mark/13.bible_quote: Then shall they see the Son of man coming in the clouds with great glory...
mark/13.note: Explanation of the meanings of clouds.

mark/13.bible_quote: And then shall they see the Son of man coming in the clouds with great glory...
mark/13.note: Were the prophecies recorded in the Gospel to be literally fulfilled, were Jesus to descend from heaven upon the clouds, who would dare to disbelieve.  No soul would feel about to accept or reject the truth.

mark/13.bible_quote: And then shall they see the Son of man coming in the clouds with great power and glory.
mark/13.note: To Him Jesus Christ had referred as the Son of man who shall come in the glory of His Father, in the clouds of heaven with power and great glory.

mark/13.bible_quote: And then shall they see the Son of man coming in the clouds...
mark/13.note: As the clouds hide the sun so the humanity of Christ hid His divine character.

mark/13.ref: Star of the West, VIII:13, p. 180 (*)
mark/13.bible_quote: Then shall they see the Son of man coming in the clouds with great power and glory.
mark/13.note: Explanation of symbolism of clouds, sun, etc. (*Tablet for Mirza Abu'l-Fadl and 'Ali Quli Khan for 100th anniversary of the birth of Baha'u'llah)

mark/13.bible_quote: And then shall they see the Son of man coming in the clouds...
mark/13.note: The cloud mentioned in the Holy Scriptures is the human body...a veil preventing them from seeing Christ.

mark/13.bible_quote: And then shall they see the Son of man coming in the clouds with great power and glory...
mark/13.note: There is a difference among believers as to the Second Coming of Christ.  The Promised Christ is Baha'u'llah and the Bab.

mark/13.ref: Ten Days in the Light of Acca, p. 45
mark/13.bible_quote: And then shall they see the Son of man coming in the clouds with great power and glory...
mark/13.note: Some are awaiting the coming of Christ in the clouds.  He has already come in the heart if you believe...

mark/13.bible_quote: And then shall they see the Son of man coming in the clouds with great power and glory...
mark/13.note: They see the body but not the Spirit...they hear the word but are unable to understand the meaning...Clouds are obstacles, the human body was the obstacle that prevented Jews from seeing the Christ.

mark/13.bible_quote: And then shall He send His angels and gather...His elect from the four winds...
mark/13.note: Who shall come with all His holy angels about Him and all nations gathered before His throne--Baha'u'llah fulfilled these conditions.

mark/13.bible_quote: And then shall He send His angels and shall gather together His elect from the four winds from the uttermost part of the earth to the uttermost part of heaven.
mark/13.note: I hope you may be quickened and vivified by the breaths of the Holy Spirit.  Then shall ye become the angels of heaven whom Christ promised would appear to gather the harvest of divine planting.

mark/13.bible_quote: Verily I say unto you, that this generation shall not pass till all these things be done.
mark/13.note: The meaning, there are two generations, the one spiritual and the other physical.  Christ was speaking of the spiritual generation.

mark/13.ref: Epistle to the Son of the Wolf, p. 143
mark/13.bible_quote: But of that day and hour knoweth no man, not the angels which are in heaven, neither the Son, but the Father.
mark/13.note: Baha'u'llah declares this is the great and terrible Day foretold in the Gospel.

mark/13.bible_quote: Watch ye therefore; for ye know not when the Master of the house cometh, lest coming suddenly he find you sleeping.
mark/13.note: The second coming of Christ will be in like manner--the signs spoken of are not to be taken literally.  Christ said, "Perhaps I shall come when you are yet asleep, for the coming of the Son of man is like the coming of a thief."

mark/13.bible_quote: Watch ye therefore...lest coming suddenly he find you sleeping.
mark/13.note: Thou wast awake, therefore thou didst advance and engage in the service of the Word of God.

mark/13.ref: The Promised Day is Come, p. 27
mark/13.bible_quote: Then shall ye see the Son of man coming in the clouds with great power and glory.
mark/13.note: Failure of the kings of Christendom to draw near unto Baha'u'llah.

mark/14.bible_quote: the chief priests and the scribes sought how they might take him by craft, and put Him to death.
mark/14.note: Jews were awaiting the Messiah...when He came, Jews rejected Jesus.  The same is the case with Baha'u'llah.

mark/14.bible_quote: as He sat at meat, there came a woman having an alabaster box of ointment of spikenard, very precious; and she brake the box and poured it on His head...she is come to annoint My body to the burying..
mark/14.note: In embalming they washed and perfumed the dead.  Christ was to be crucified so she annointed Him and dried it with her hair.

mark/14.ref: Star of the West, VIII:11, p. 144
mark/14.bible_quote: there came a woman having an alabaster box of ointment, very precious; she broke the box and poured it on His head...Why was this waste of the ointment made?  It might have been sold and given to the
mark/14.note: The perfumed oil bottle represents the heart of Mary; the ointment is the love of God in Mary's heart.  The poor in this sense meant those who needed love.  We must always cherish the poor for His sake.

mark/14.ref: Mary Lucas, Visit to Acca, p. 42
mark/14.bible_quote: She hath done what she could; she is come aforehand to anoint my body for the burying.
mark/14.note: The ancient embalming they washed and perfumed the dead.  Christ was to be crucified and so she annointed Him and dried it with her hair.

mark/14.ref: Star of the West, XII:9, p. 157 (*)
mark/14.bible_quote: Wheresoever this gospel shall be preached throughout the whole world, this also that [Mary Magdalene] hath done shall be spoken of for a memorial of her.
mark/14.note: There was one name that always brought joy to the face of Baha'u'llah.  His expression would change at the metnion of it...it was Mary Magdalene. (*Juliet Thompson's Diary?)

mark/14.ref: Star of the West, XIV:12, p. 353 (*)
mark/14.bible_quote: Wheresoever this gospel shall be preached throughout the whole world, this also that [Mary Magdalene] hath done shall be spoken of her for a memorial of her.
mark/14.note: Were it not for the tests the face of Mary, the Magdalene, would not glisten with the light of firmness and certainty unto all horizons. (*Tablet to Mrs. Brittingham?)

mark/14.bible_quote: And Judas went unto the chief priests to betray Him...And it was the third hour and they crucified Him.
mark/14.note: Be pure--to be pure is to be selfless.

mark/14.ref: Star of the West, X:14, p. 270 (*)
mark/14.bible_quote: Judas Iscariot, one of the twelve, went unto the chief priests to betray Him unto them...
mark/14.note: Judas Iscariot first believed in Christ then turned away from Him.  I hope that thou mayest daily increase in firmness and become the cause of the guidance of other souls.  (*Tablet to American believer)

mark/14.ref: Star of the West, XI:14, p. 242  (*)
mark/14.bible_quote: Judas Iscariot, one of the twelve went unto the chief priests to betray Him unto them.
mark/14.note: The Covenant is an ocean; violators are the foam.  They shall be completely forgotten, but the ocean of the Covenant is eternally surging.  They will be forgotten like Judas and his associates. (*Tablet to Mr. & Mrs. MacNutt, Brooklyn)

mark/14.ref: Star of the West, XIII:1, p. 21,25
mark/14.bible_quote: Judas Iscariot, one of the twelve went unto the chief priests to betray Him unto them.
mark/14.note: Judas separated himself from Jesus.  Any person who has left the Cause did so because of his own actions, intrigues and evil plots.

mark/14.ref: Star of the West, X:14, p. 269 (*)
mark/14.bible_quote: Judas Iscariot, one of the twelve went unto the chief priests to betray Him unto them.
mark/14.note: Violators like Judas Iscariot have for financial motives deviated from the Covenant.  Baha'i unity cannot be preserved save through the Covenant of God. (*Tablet to Miss Mary Lesch)

mark/14.bible_quote: he will show you a large upper room...and they made ready the Passover...Jesus said, Take, eat, this is My body...This is My blood of the new testament which is shed for many...
mark/14.note: because there was excessive love among them...that table surpassed the royal tables...

mark/14.ref: Star of the West, XI:16, p. 269
mark/14.bible_quote: And His disciples...made ready the Passover...and they sat and did eat.
mark/14.note: It is well to worship in any place...the object is to turn to God.  When Christ gathered His disciples together for the Last Supper, it was not in a church, it was in a room.  The heart should be attracted, spirit filled with Divine Glad Tidings

mark/14.ref: Star of the West, XI:16, p. 275 (*)
mark/14.bible_quote: And in the evening Jesus cometh with the twelve...and they sat and did eat.
mark/14.note: The manna which came from heaven for the disciples was bounty, knowledge, faith, assurance, love and attraction, attachment and enkindlement...My hope is that that gathering may also eat from this manna and bounties.  (*Tablet to Mr. Hall)

mark/14.ref: Star of the West, XVIII:9, p. 284
mark/14.bible_quote: And the disciples...made ready the Passover; and as they sat they did eat.
mark/14.note: Because there was excessive love among the individual members who had convened there, that table surpassed the royal tables and it was established as the Lord's Supper--even now it is known as such.

mark/14.ref: Star of the West, IV:12, p. 203 (*)
mark/14.bible_quote: And in the evening He cometh with the twelve and...Jesus took the bread and blessed and brake it...and He took the cup and when He had given thanks He gave it to them.
mark/14.note: Inasmuch as there was present material bread and likewise heavenly manna which was descending upon them; it was verily the Lord's Supper. (*Talk at 19 day feast, 10/16/1912, home of Mr. Helen Goodall)

mark/14.bible_quote: And they made ready for Passover...And as they did eat Jesus took bread and blessed and brake it and gave to them and said, Take, eat, this is My body.
mark/14.note: Make an effort in every meeting that the Lord's Supper may become realized and heavenly food--love, affinity, union of souls, descend...then 'Abdu'l-Baha will also be present.

mark/14.bible_quote: Woe to that man by whom the Son of man is betrayed; good were it for that man if he had never been born.
mark/14.note: If the foot of man deviate as did that of Judas, so that he became human after he had been divine...there is in that a great lesson to people of understanding.

mark/14.bible_quote: And as they did eat, Jesus took bread, blessed and brake it, and gave it to them...
mark/14.note: Designated as the Lord's Supper, they ate heavenly food at that supper--the love, knowledge, mysteries and bestowal of God.

mark/14.bible_quote: Jesus took bread and blessed and brake it...Take, eat, this is My body.
mark/14.note: Symbols signifying bounties and perfections...

mark/14.bible_quote: Jesus took bread and blessed and brake it, and said, Take, eat, this is My body.  And He took the cup...This is My blood of the new testament, which is shed for many.
mark/14.note: You have written about the nineteen day feast.  This arrangement of affection causeth everlasting life.

mark/14.bible_quote: And as they did eat, Jesus took bread and blessed and brake it...Take, eat, this is My body...
mark/14.note: The Supper was a spiritual meal.  This heavenly food consisted in the love, knowledge, mysteries and bestowal of God.  Religious leaders thought material food was changed into spiritual food.

mark/14.ref: Ten Days in the Light of Acca, p. 74
mark/14.bible_quote: And as they did eat, Jesus took bread and blessed and brake it and gave it to them...
mark/14.note: This is the blessed Supper of the Lord for we have gathered under the shadow of the Blessed Perfection...This was indeed a spiritual feast where Love reigned.

mark/14.ref: Flowers...from the Rose Garden at Acca, p. 27 (*)
mark/14.bible_quote: This is My blood of the new testament which is shed for many.
mark/14.note: Sacrifice of Jesus proved His love for mankind, followers believed in Him and were delivered from sin through their obediance and changed lives. (*Talk by Mirza Haydar 'Ali, 11/11/1908, Akka)

mark/14.bible_quote: And He said unto them, This is My blood of the new testatment which is shed for many.
mark/14.note: These verses have been interpreted by the churches in such a superstitious way that it is impossible for human reason to accept the explanation.

mark/14.bible_quote: This is My blood of the new testament which is shed for many.
mark/14.note: I gave My blood for the life of the world...Those who turned towards Christ were saved from their attachment to sin.

mark/14.ref: Star of the West, XXII:9, p. 258 (*)
mark/14.bible_quote: This is My blood of the new testament which is shed for many.
mark/14.note: He came people say to redeem us through His blood.  He sacrificed His life that He might educate humanity and illumine the world of reality. (*Tablet)

mark/14.ref: Star of the West, II:15, p. 16 (*)
mark/14.bible_quote: Verily I say unto you I will drink no more of the fruit of the vine until that day that I drink it new in the Kingdom of God.
mark/14.note: It is evident His Holiness Christ did not mean material grapes but it was a spiritual condition and a heavenly state which He interpreted as fruit. (*Tablet)

mark/14.bible_quote: Verily I say unto you, I will drink no more of the fruit of the vine until the day that I drink it new in the Kingdom of God.
mark/14.note: The appearance of the Holy Manifestations is for the purpose of causing the heavenly table to descend.  This table means divine virtues and characteristics.

mark/14.ref: Ten Days in the Light of Acca, p. 69
mark/14.bible_quote: And they came to a place which was named Gethsemane...
mark/14.note: Someday the Rizwan will be visited by pilgrims just as the Garden of Gethsemane is sacred with memories of Jesus Christ.

mark/14.bible_quote: The Spirit is ready but the flesh is weak.
mark/14.note: Whatever troubles we have on our way to the Kingdom are a test to the soul.  The way to God is strewn with troubles and difficulties.  Remember what Christ said, the spirit is powerful.

mark/14.bible_quote: The Spirit truly is ready but the flesh is weak.
mark/14.note: The spirit of man is powerful but the body is weak and incapable.  It is intended that the spirit triumphs.

mark/14.bible_quote: And immediately, while He spake, cometh Judas...he that betrayed Him had given them a token.
mark/14.note: Judas chose to turn from Jesus and go his own way.  'Abdu'l-Baha was rejected by the violators.

mark/14.ref: Daily Lessons received at Acca, p. 98
mark/14.bible_quote: cometh Judas...he that betrayed Him...they laid their hands on Him and took Him.
mark/14.note: Verily, tests withheld a great Apostle from the mercy of God and made him take part in the shedding of the blood of Jesus Christ.

mark/14.bible_quote: cometh Judas...had given them a token...Whomsoever I shall kiss is He...
mark/14.note: The betrayal of Baha'u'llah more shameful than the betrayal of Jesus Christ.

mark/14.bible_quote: came Judas...and kissed Him...they laid their hands on Him and took Him.
mark/14.note: Baha'u'llah has left no room for dissension--some wish to create this as Judas did.  Violators are not to be accepted.

mark/14.bible_quote: And immediately, while He yet spake, cometh Judas one of the twelve, he that betrayed Him...
mark/14.note: Impossible to train another until he first conquers his own self and his desires...Judas was deprived of the Kingdom of God.

mark/14.ref: Ten Days in the Light of Acca, p. 17
mark/14.bible_quote: cometh Judas, one of the twelve...he that betrayed Him...
mark/14.note: Judas, on of the twelve disciples of Jesus Christ betrayed Him.  God will assist all who are firm in His Cause.

mark/14.bible_quote: And he that betrayed Him [Judas] had given them a token saying, Whomsoever I shall kiss, that same is He; take Him...
mark/14.note: There were people like Judas, who, by their own deeds, separated themselves from Christ [similar to violators who turned against 'Abdu'l-Baha].

mark/14.ref: Star of the West, III:2, p. 3 (*)
mark/14.bible_quote: and he that betrayed Him had given them a token...
mark/14.note: Judas began well but failed in the end.  Paul was an enemy of Christ but he became one of his best servants.  It is wrong to judge--the end of man is not known.  (* From discourses in London and Paris)

mark/14.bible_quote: And he that betrayed Him had given them a token...
mark/14.note: Judas turned away on account of jealousy of Peter.  Consider the predecessors as a warning and purify thy heart...

mark/14.bible_quote: And one of them that stood by drew a sword and smote a servant of the high priest and cut off his ear...
mark/14.note: Christ taught, Resist not evil.  When we hold fast to the foundation of religion, differences will disappear.

mark/14.ref: Star of the West, IV:3, p. 55 (*)
mark/14.bible_quote: And one of them that stood by drew a sword and smote a servant of the high priest and cut off his ear...
mark/14.note: When we hold fast to the foundations of the religions of God all differences are dispelled. (* Answers to questions asked by theologians in Paris)

mark/14.ref: Epistle to the Son of the Wolf, p. 48-49
mark/14.bible_quote: And the chief priests and all the council sought for witness against Jesus to put Him to death...
mark/14.note: When I came to them in My glory, they turned aside...The Jewish doctors disputed with Jesus and perpetrated what hath made the Holy Spirit lament.

mark/14.bible_quote: And the chief priests and all the council sought for witness against Jesus to put him to death; and found none...many bare false witness...
mark/14.note: Scribes and Pharisees spread slanders and caused Him to be crucified.

mark/14.bible_quote: We heard Him say, I will destroy this temple...within three days I will build another made without hands.
mark/14.note: Though Jesus threatened to destroy the Temple it did not hinder the spread of the Gospel.

mark/14.bible_quote: the high priest said unto Him, Art Thou the Christ?  Jesus said, I am...then the high priest saith, What need we any witnesses?  Ye have heard the blasphemy...And they condemned Him...
mark/14.note: Observe how that persecution and scorn were changed to glory.  The Jews scoffed...saying, This man is naught but a sorcerer, blasphemeth and is possessed of a devil.

mark/14.ref: The Promised Day is Come, p. 27
mark/14.bible_quote: ye shall see the Son of man...coming in the clouds of heaven...
mark/14.note: Failture of the kings of Christendom to draw near unto Baha'u'llah.

mark/14.ref: Epistle to the Son of the Wolf, p. 48-49
mark/14.bible_quote: the chief priests and the scribes sought how they might take him by craft and put Him to death.
mark/14.note: When I came to them in My glory, they turned aside...The Jewish doctors disputed with Jesus and perpetrated what hath made the Holy Spirit lament.

mark/14.bible_quote: But he [Peter] began to curse and to swear, saying I know not this man of whom ye speak...
mark/14.note: Peter who was the Rock [of the Christian Dispensation] was firm and solid...but the Rock quaked a little.  I hope you will become steadfast, firm, solid...

mark/14.ref: Daily Lessons Received at Acca, p. 98
mark/14.bible_quote: But he [Peter] began to curse and to swear, saying, I know not this man of whom ye speak...
mark/14.note: The tests made Peter the Apostle deny Christ.  Many a just soul did not endure the power of tests.

mark/14.bible_quote: But he [Peter] began to curse and to swear saying, I know not this man of whom ye speak...
mark/14.note: At that time Peter was weak for he had not yet received the baptism of the Holy Spirit' afterwards he became firm to the end.

mark/14.bible_quote: And he [Peter] began to curse and to swear saying, I know not this man of whom ye speak...
mark/14.note: Christ only educated eleven men; the greatest of them was Peter who, when tested, thrice denied Christ.  In spite of this the Cause of Christ permeated the world.  Reflect what will take place in the future.  Baha'u'llah educated thousands.

mark/14.ref: Star of the West, IX:2, p. 23(Talk in Haifa 12/22)
mark/14.bible_quote: But he began to curse and to swear saying, I know not this man of whom ye speak...
mark/14.note: When Jesus Christ was crucified He had twelve disciples...one denied Him...another sold Him for a little money.  Notwithstanding this, consider how important was His Cause.  There were at least 100,000 souls who would sacrifice their lives for Baha

mark/14.ref: Star of the West, IX:2, p. 23(Talk in Haifa 12/22)
mark/14.bible_quote: And Judas Iscariot, one of the twelve went unto the chief priests to betray Him unto them...
mark/14.note: When Jesus was crucified He had twelve disciples...one denied Him...another sold Him for a little money.  Notwithstanding this, consider how important was His Cause.  There were at least 100,000 souls who would have sacrificed their lives for Baha

mark/14.ref: Star of the West, IV:12, p. 207 (*)
mark/14.bible_quote: I know not of whom you speak...and Peter called to mind the word Jesus said unto him, Before the cock crows twice thou shalt deny Me thrice.
mark/14.note: Comparison between men and women: Peter and Mary Magdalene. (* Interview with San Francisco newspaper reporter)

mark/14.ref: Star of the West, XIV:12, p. 353 (*)
mark/14.bible_quote: he began to curse and to swear saying, I know not this man...Peter called to mind the word of Jesus said unto him...he wept...
mark/14.note: Even the glorious Peter was not rescued from the flame of trials...and wavered.  (*Extract from Tablet)

mark/14.bible_quote: And Peter called to mind the word that Jesus said unto him, Before the cock crows twice, thou shalt deny Me thrice.
mark/14.note: This was before the Holy Spirit had descended on Him at Pentecost.

mark/14.bible_quote: And Peter called to mind the word that Jesus said unto him, Before the cock crows twice, thou shalt deny Me thrice...he wept.
mark/14.note: Comparison between the conduct of Peter and that of Mary Magdalene at the time of the crucifixion of Jesus Christ...a proof that woman is equivalent and complement of man.

mark/14.bible_quote: And the second time the cock crew...Peter called to mind the word that Jesus said unto him, Before the cock crows twice, thou shalt deny Me thrice...
mark/14.note: The great Peter denied Jesus and the Jews scoffed at Him and despised Him, yet the Fire they thought they had quenched kindled the hearts of the righteous.

mark/14.ref: Ten Days in the Light of Acca, p. 33
mark/14.bible_quote: Jesus said unto him, Before the cock crows twice, thou shalt deny Me thrice.
mark/14.note: Peter was the greatest of all the disciples yet he denied Jesus Christ three times.  What happened afterwards?  The Truth in Christ spread all over the world.

mark/15.ref: The Promised Day is Come, p. 31
mark/15.bible_quote: the chief priests held a consultation with the elders and scribes and the council, and bound Jesus and carried Him away to Pilate.
mark/15.note: Baha'u'llah warned the Pope, Guard thyself lest darkness spread its veils over thee.

mark/15.bible_quote: For Pilate knew that the chief priests had delivered Him for envy...But the chief priests moved the people...the chief priests mocked Him...
mark/15.note: Adversaries of Jesus were rabbis...whereas those of the Bab represented the civil and ecclesiastical powers who conspired against the upholders and the Revelation.

mark/15.bible_quote: For he knew the chief priests had delivered Him for envy...and they moved the people...the chief priests mocked Him...
mark/15.note: Treatment of Baha'u'llah analogous to that of Jesus Christ at the hands of ecclesiastical leaders.

mark/15.ref: Star of the West, IV:1, p. 18
mark/15.bible_quote: Jesus went into the Temple and began to cast out them that sold and bought in the Temple, and overthrew the tables of the money-changers and the seats of them that sold doves...
mark/15.note: Christians point out that this was a wonderful event, that His Holiness without opposition from the Jews was permitted to enter their most sacred place and proclaim the Word of God...

mark/15.bible_quote: they platted a crown of thorns and put in about His head...
mark/15.note: The Pharisees had evil opinions of Jesus Christ.  But the radiance of His illumination was diffused over the whole world; they regarded even the ass on which He was mounted as a throne, and the thorns a brilliant diadem.

mark/15.bible_quote: And they platted a crown of thorns and put it about His head.
mark/15.note: Consider how they crowned Jesus with a crown of thorns...now how thousands of people adorn their heads in His name with the most brilliant gems.  Woe! woe unto such heedless people.

mark/15.bible_quote: And they platted a crown of thorns and put it about His head.
mark/15.note: His abasement was His glorification; His crown of thorns is a heavenly diadem.  When they pressed it upon His blessed head...they laid the foundation of His everlasting Kingdom...

mark/15.ref: Epistle to the Son of the Wolf, p. 100
mark/15.bible_quote: And they platted a crown of thorns and put it upon His head...smote Him...spit upon Him...mocked Him...led Him out to be crucified...
mark/15.note: Sufferings of Jesus analogous to those of Prophets caused by divines.  Baha'u'llah recalls the sufferings of the Prophets.

mark/15.bible_quote: they clothed Him with purple and platted a crown of thorns, and put it upon His head.  And began to salute Him, Hail, King of the Jews!  And they smote Him and did spit upon Him...and led Him away to
mark/15.note: The Pharisees persecuted Jesus Christ, the result was that His lamp became ignited, His light began to shine...

mark/15.bible_quote: And they platted a crown of thorns and put it about His head, and began to salute Him, Hail, King of the Jews!
mark/15.note: Of the same class are the Pharisees and priests in this manifest day, they are isolated from the gifts of your Lord...

mark/15.bible_quote: and platted a crown of thorns and put it about His head...smote Him...spit upon Him...mocked Him...led Him away to crucify Him.
mark/15.note: Alas for the souls because of what they committed against the Word of God.

mark/15.bible_quote: they platted a crown of thorns and put it about His head...smote Him...spit upon Him...mocked Him...led Him away to crucify Him.
mark/15.note: The Jews did not know the meaning of the prophecies.  Literal interpretation veiled the true meaning.

mark/15.bible_quote: the soldiers platted a crown of thorns and put it about His head...smote Him...spit upon Him...
mark/15.note: There was no abuse and persecution which they did not heap upon Him.

mark/15.bible_quote: they platted a crown of thorns and put it about His head...smote Him...spit upon Him...mocked Him...
mark/15.note: They did not investigate the truth.  This is one of the Baha'i principles.

mark/15.bible_quote: they platted a crown of thorns and put it about His head...smote Him...spit upon Him...mocked Him...
mark/15.note: Jews rose up against Jesus but He is now glorified.  They did not succeed in their efforts to stop the establishment of the Kingdom.  God's dominion is eternal and will be set up.

mark/15.bible_quote: they platted a crown of thorns and put it about His head...smote Him...spite upon Him...mocked Him...led Him away to crucify Him.
mark/15.note: All the prophets of God were persecuted.  Jesus Christ suffered martyrdom in order to summon mankind to unity and love.  It is the divine purpose of religion.

mark/15.bible_quote: they platted a crown of thorns and put it about His head...smote Him...spit upon Him...led Him out to be crucified.
mark/15.note: The Jews rejected Jesus and tortured and crucified Him.  All Prophets were scorned and persecuted.

mark/15.ref: Star of the West, IV:9, p. 156 (*)
mark/15.bible_quote: And they platted a crown of thorns and put it about His head...smote Him...spit upon Him...mocked Him...led Him away to be crucified.
mark/15.note: He endured all things so that the world might unite and that He might cement the hearts of men through His love. (*Address in Stuttgart, Germany on 4/6/1913)

mark/15.ref: Star of the West, IX:15, p. 171 (*)
mark/15.bible_quote: And they smote Him on the head...spit upon Him...mocked Him...led Him out to crucify Him.
mark/15.note: Later on it became manifest that He was the light of Truth and was betowing the spirit of eternal life--No Prophet cometh unto them but they laugh Him to scorn. (*Tablet for Juanita Storch)

mark/15.bible_quote: and they platted a crown of thorns and put it upon His head...smote Him...spit upon Him...mocked Him...led Him out to be crucified.
mark/15.note: Baha'u'llah recalled in anticipation of His own sufferings those of Jesus Christ.

mark/15.ref: Ten Days in the Light of Acca, p. 13
mark/15.bible_quote: they platted a crown of thorns and put it about His head...smote Him...
mark/15.note: The world must come to know the Word in Christ.  His mission was to uplift the very world which refused Him.

mark/15.ref: Ten Days in the Light of Acca, p. 19
mark/15.bible_quote: and they smote Him on the head...spit upon Him...mocked Him...led Him away to crucify Him.
mark/15.note: The enemies of Christ persecuted Him and crucified Him yet He loved them all.  If the love of God is shining in our hearts we will love all alike.

mark/15.bible_quote: Pilate scourged Him; soliders platted a crown of thorns and put it about His head...smote Him...spit upon Him...mocked Him...led Him out to crucify Him.
mark/15.note: All through His life He suffered oppression and hardship.  Humanity was His enemy.  In spite of all this He was the embodiment of pity, supreme goodness and love.

mark/15.bible_quote: platted a crown of thorns and put it about His head...
mark/15.note: Jesus Christ knew that all earthly diadems were at His feet, therefore He said, All power is given Me in heaven and in earth.

mark/15.bible_quote: platted a crown of thorns and put it about His head...crucified Him...
mark/15.note: To all outward appearances they overcame Him but all the kings of the earth have not been able to withstand Him.

mark/15.bible_quote: and led Him out to crucify Him.
mark/15.note: No death of religion-founder comparable to that of the Bab except in the Gospels.

mark/15.bible_quote: led Him out to crucify Him.
mark/15.note: The Talmud and its superstitions veiled His Holiness so completely that they crucified their promised Messiah.

mark/15.bible_quote: they led Him out to crucify Him.
mark/15.note: Blind imitations and hereditary prejudices have become the cause of hatred...therefore we must seek truth.

mark/15.bible_quote: they led Him out to crucify Him.
mark/15.note: The Jews crucified Jesus.  Because Jews were captives to ancestral imitations they denied His Holiness Jesus.  We must forsake all such beliefs.

mark/15.bible_quote: led Him out to crucify Him.
mark/15.note: Jesus Christ, the Bab and Baha'u'lah suffered for mankind because of their love.

mark/15.bible_quote: they led Him out to crucify Him.
mark/15.note: If the Jews had investigated the reality of Christ they would have beheld His beauty and truth.  They were withheld because of bigoted imitations.

mark/15.bible_quote: And when they had crucified Him they parted His garments.
mark/15.note: Before the appearance in human form, the Word of God was in the utmost sanctity and glory...when it shone in the body it fell into the hands of the Jews and at last was crucified.

mark/15.bible_quote: And when they had crucified Him they parted His garments.
mark/15.note: He rose to teach and educate men and so He sacrificed Himself to give the spirit of life.  He perished in body so as to quicken others by His spirit.

mark/15.bible_quote: And when they had crucified Him they parted His garments.
mark/15.note: In a revealed prayer Baha'u'llah exalts Mirza Mihdi's death to the rank of those acts of atonement associated with Abraham's intended sacrifice, the crucifixion of Jesus Christ and the martyrdom of the Imam Husayn.

mark/15.ref: Epistle to the Son of the Wolf, p. 100
mark/15.bible_quote: And when they had crucified Him, they parted His garments.
mark/15.note: Suffering inflicted upon Jesus Christ by the priests similar to that inflicted on other martyrs by divines.

mark/15.bible_quote: and when they had crucified Him they parted His garments.
mark/15.note: Jesus gave His life that this world might be released from discord and strife, for the unity of mankind.

mark/15.bible_quote: when they had crucified Him they parted His garments.
mark/15.note: may you offer yourselves in the threshold of sacrifice for the betterment of the whole world.

mark/15.bible_quote: And when they had crucified Him, they parted His garments.
mark/15.note: They sentenced Him to death.  Why did this happen?  Because they were blindly following imitations, the Jews rejected Jesus.  They refused to investigate Truth.

mark/15.bible_quote: And when they had crucified Him they parted His garments.
mark/15.note: knowing what would happen, He arose to proclaim His Message...offered His life as a sacrifice for humanity.

mark/15.ref: Utterances in letter from Emogene Hoagg to Mrs(*)
mark/15.bible_quote: And when they had crucified Him they parted His garments.
mark/15.note: The Jewish clergy were busy creating doubts in the minds of the people...Therefore they say Jesus was a false Messiah.  Those who have weak faith will surely be shaken.(* I.D.Brittingham, Haifa, 1/1914, translated by Monever Khanum)

mark/15.bible_quote: And when they had crucified Him they parted His garments.
mark/15.note: The crucifixion was the means of spreading the light of the Cause of God.

mark/15.bible_quote: and when they had crucified Him they parted His garments.
mark/15.note: In the time of Jesus cruelty and tyranny were such that people crucified even Jesus.  Literal interpretation veiled the Truth from the Jews.  They had no knowledge of the symbology of the Scriptures.

mark/15.ref: Star of the West, IV:1, p. 14 (Lawh-i-Aqdas)
mark/15.bible_quote: And when they had crucified Him they parted His garments.
mark/15.note: Remember, the most learned doctors of His country in His age condemned Him to be killed whilst one who was the catcher of fishes believed in Him.

mark/15.ref: Star of the West, IV:2, p. 40 (*)
mark/15.bible_quote: And when they had crucified Him they parted His garments.
mark/15.note: He sacrificed His life that the oil in the lamps of our souls might become ignited and His light shine from them. (*Talk in New York City, 6/11/1912)

mark/15.ref: Star of the West, V:11, p. 169
mark/15.bible_quote: And when they had crucified Him, they parted His garments.
mark/15.note: they crucified their promised Messiah...

mark/15.ref: Star of the West, XV:9, p. 254 (*)
mark/15.bible_quote: And when they had crucified Him they parted His garments.
mark/15.note: Jesus Christ gave His life on the cross for the unity of mankind.  Only a few were attracted to Him but with this small army He conquered the world. (*Talk in New York City)

mark/15.ref: Star of the West, XVI:9, p. 633 (*)
mark/15.bible_quote: And when they had crucified Him they parted His garments.
mark/15.note: Some Jews cried, O God, hasten the Day when the Promised One will manifest Himself.  When He came they knew Him not...they killed Him...they could not see the Reality of Christ. (*Bahai Scriptures, p. 729-30)

mark/15.bible_quote: And when they had crucified Him they parted His garments.
mark/15.note: Christ suffered.  He accepted all His trials because of the immortality of His spirit.

mark/15.bible_quote: And when they had crucified Him they parted His garments.
mark/15.note: Christ suffered unto death to bring Light...All the prophets of God came to promote unity.

mark/15.ref: Ten Days in the Light of Acca, p. 31
mark/15.bible_quote: and when they had crucified Him they parted His garments.
mark/15.note: All Manifestations have been rejected and persecuted; men have worshipped personality but were blind to their Reality and Truth.

mark/15.bible_quote: And when they had crucified Him they parted His garments.
mark/15.note: The body of Jesus was crucified but the Spirit of Christ is always pouring upon the world...

mark/15.bible_quote: and when they had crucified Him they parted His garments.
mark/15.note: And at length He gave His life in sacrifice for humanity...His heart was full of love for all the world, His goodness was destined to reach each one--as they began to realize these things they repented...

mark/15.bible_quote: when they had crucified Him they parted His garments.
mark/15.note: The Jews were blind to Reality.  Literal interpretation prevented their seeing the Beauty of Christ, and they crucified Him.

mark/15.bible_quote: and it was the third hour and they crucified Him.
mark/15.note: The Jews rose against Jesus Christ even to the shedding of His blood.  Had they investigated Reality they would have accepted their promised Messiah, Jesus Christ.

mark/15.bible_quote: the chief priests mocking said...He saved others; himself he cannot save.
mark/15.note: Treatment of Baha'u'llah by divines analogous to that of Jesus Christ by the priests.

mark/16.ref: Daily Lessons received at Acca, p. 62
mark/16.bible_quote: Ye seek Jesus of Nazareth; which was crucified: He is risen...
mark/16.note: Because it is clear literal text it is believed.  Explanation of symbolism.

mark/16.ref: Some Answered Questions, XXIII, p. 119-20
mark/16.bible_quote: Ye seek Jesus of Nazareth; which was crucified: He is risen...
mark/16.note: As Christ came from a spiritual heaven of the Divine Kingdom, therefore His disappearance under the earth for three days has an inner signification and is not an outward fact.

mark/16.ref: TAB:III, p. 601
mark/16.bible_quote: He appeared first to Mary Magdalene...And she went and told them that had been with Him, neither believed they them.
mark/16.note: Mary Magdalene kept firm in the Cause.  She surpassed men in defending the Cause.  This is a manifest Light.

mark/16.ref: Star of the West, X:12, p. 232 (*)
mark/16.bible_quote: Now when Jesus was risen early the first day of the week, He appeared first to Mary Magdalene.  And she went and told them that had been with Him, as they mourned and wept.
mark/16.note: Mary Magdalene, only a peasant, gained a precedence of the queens of the world who have left no trace, but Mary Magdalene is like unto a star. (*Tablet to Mrs. Annie L. Parmerton, Cincinnati, Ohio)

mark/16.ref: Star of the West, X:17, p. 307 (*)
mark/16.bible_quote: Jesus appeared first to Mary Magdalene out of whom He had cast seven devils.  And she went and told them that had been with Him, as they mourned.
mark/16.note: Later on it became evident what crowns studded with brilliant gems of guidance were placed on the heads of Mary Magdalene and the other Mary, the Mother of Jesus. (*Unveiling of Divine Plan for Islands of the Sea, read 1919 at 11th Convention)

mark/16.ref: Promulgation of Universal Peace, p. 130
mark/16.bible_quote: And she went and told them that had been with Him, as they mourned and wept...believed not...afterward Jesus...upbraided them for their unbelief.
mark/16.note: Christ had twelve disciples, Judas became a traitor, the remaining disciples were wavering.  It is certain that the one who re-established their faith was Mary Magdalene.  The world consists of two factors--male and female.  Each is the complement

mark/16.ref: Promulgation of Universal Peace, p. 276
mark/16.bible_quote: He appeared first to Mary Magdalene...and she went and told them that had been with Him as they mourned and wept.
mark/16.note: Comparison between Peter and Mary Magdalene, an example of the capability of woman.  Baha'u'llah emancipated women.

mark/16.ref: Promulgation of Universal Peace, p. 415
mark/16.bible_quote: And the Angel said...ye seek Jesus...tell His disciples that He is risen...
mark/16.note: Mary Magdalene was transformed and became the means through which the confirmation of God descended upon the disciples.

mark/16.ref: Promulgation of Universal Peace, p. 415-16
mark/16.bible_quote: Jesus appeared first to Mary Magdalene out of whom He had cast seven devils and she went and told them that had been with Him, as they mourned and wept...they believed not...
mark/16.note: Trust in the bounty and grace of God and rest assured in the bestowals of His eternal outpouring.

mark/16.ref: 'Abdu'l-Baha in London, p. 108
mark/16.bible_quote: Jesus appeared first to Mary Magdalene...And she went and told them that had been with Him as they mourned and wept.
mark/16.note: Mary Magdalene strengthened the disciples.  In the sight of God sex makes no difference.  He or she is greatest who is nearest to God.

mark/16.ref: Flowers culled from the Rose garden at Acca, p.15
mark/16.bible_quote: Jesus appeared first to Mary Magdalene out of whom He had cast seven devils...And she went and told them that had been with Him...
mark/16.note: After she had believed in Christ observe the transformation, see her glory.

mark/16.ref: Ten Days in the Light of Acca, p. 17
mark/16.bible_quote: Jesus appeared first to Mary Magdalene...And she went and told them that had been with Him...neither believed they them.
mark/16.note: Mary Magdalene held fastly to the Christ and made others firm.  God will assist all who are firm in His Cause.

mark/16.ref: 'Abdu'l-Baha on Divine Philosophy, p. 50
mark/16.bible_quote: And she went and told them that had been with Him...
mark/16.note: Mary Magdalene was superior to all the men of her time.  She gathered the others together and said, "Why do ye mourn?"  Her reality is shining from the horizon of Christ.

mark/16.ref: Star of the West, VII:10, p. 85 (*)
mark/16.bible_quote: Go ye into all the world and preach the Gospel to every living creature.
mark/16.note: Through this superhuman service the rays of peace and conciliation may illumine and enlighten all the regions and the world of humanity may find peace. (*Tablet to the West)

mark/16.ref: Wisdom of 'Abdu'l-Baha,p.109;Paris Talks,p.119
mark/16.bible_quote: And they went forth and preached everywhere the Lord working with them and confirming the word with signs following.
mark/16.note: After Him came His chosen Apostles and they went far and wide carrying the light of their Master's teaching into a dark world.

mark/16.ref: Wisdom of 'Abdu'l-Baha,p.154;Paris Talks,p.166
mark/16.bible_quote: And they went forth and preached everywhere.
mark/16.note: Consider the influence of Jesus Christ on His Apostles.  These simple men were enabled by the Power of the Holy Spirit to spread the glad tidings.

mark/16.ref: Star of the West, IV:2, p. 41 (*)
mark/16.bible_quote: And they went forth and preached everywhere, the Lord working with them and confirming the Word with signs.
mark/16.note: We must be willing to give our lives.  We must go among the people of the world, summoning them. (*Talk at 309 West 78th Street, New York City, 1912)

mark/16.ref: Star of the West, V:14, p. 215 (*)
mark/16.bible_quote: And they went forth and preached everywhere, the Lord working with them...
mark/16.note: We must act accordingly and follow in their footsteps. (*Trumpet call to the East and West)

mark/16.ref: Star of the West, V:1, p. 6
mark/16.bible_quote: And they went forth and preached everywhere, the Lord working with them...
mark/16.note: Command to travel in every country...as did the Apostles of Jesus Christ.

mark/16.ref: Star of the West, VII:14, p. 131
mark/16.bible_quote: And they went forth and preached everywhere, the Lord working with them and confirming the word with signs following.
mark/16.note: Consider with what severance, attraction and enkindlement the apostles arose in the promulgation of the word of God.

luke/1.ref: Utterances in Emogene Hoagg to Mrs. I.D. (*)
luke/1.bible_quote: There was a priest...named Zacharias...there appeared unto him an angel and the angel said unto him, Thy prayer is heard; thy wife Elizabeth shall bear a son and thou shall call his name John.
luke/1.note: The Jewish clergy said according to prophecy he should come from heaven in the promised Day and this John the Baptist had a father and a mother.  The clergy were busy creating doubts in the minds of the people.

luke/1.bible_quote: And the Lord appeared unto Zacharias...thy wife Elizabeth shall bear thee a son and thou shalt call his name John...he shall be filled with the Holy Ghost.  And many of the children of Israel shall he
luke/1.note: It was Yahya son of Zachariah who gave unto the people the tidings of the Manifestation of Jesus.

luke/1.bible_quote: And he shall go before in the spirit and power of Elias, to turn the hearts of the fathers to the children...to make ready a people prepared for the Lord.
luke/1.note: John the Baptist, fore-runner or herald of Jesus Christ.  Virtues of John the Baptist similar to those of Elias.

luke/1.bible_quote: Fear not, Mary...thou shalt conceive...and bring forth a son and shall call Him Jesus...
luke/1.note: Christ came from heaven, though outwardly He came from the womb of Mary.

luke/1.bible_quote: Fear not, Mary...thou shalt conceive...and bring forth a son and shall call His name Jesus.  He shall be great and shall be called the Son of the Highest...of His kingdom there shall be no end.
luke/1.note: Were a myriad voices be raised, no ear would listen if upon a fatherless child hath been conferred Prophethood.

luke/1.bible_quote: Fear not, Mary...behold thou shalt conceive and bring forth a son and shalt call His name Jesus...The Holy thing that shall be born of thee shall be called the Son of God.
luke/1.note: Physically Jesus was born of a woman but the Christ Reality came from the city of Eternity.

luke/1.bible_quote: Fear not, Mary...thou shalt conceive in thy womb, and bring forth a son and shall call His name Jesus.
luke/1.note: Jesus came from heaven though outwardly He came from the womb of Mary.

luke/1.bible_quote: Fear not, Mary...thou shalt conceive in thy womb and bring forth a son and shall call His name Jesus...He shall be called the Son of the Highest...
luke/1.note: The Reality, perfections and Spirit of Christ came from God but He was born of Mary.

luke/1.bible_quote: Fear not, Mary...thou shalt conceive in thy womb and bring forth a son and shall call His name Jesus.
luke/1.note: Though Jesus said He came from heaven, they knew that He was born of Mary.

luke/1.bible_quote: And the angel answered and said unto her, the Holy Ghost shall come upon thee and the power of the Highest shall overshadow thee; therefore the Holy thing which shall be born of thee shall be called t
luke/1.note: Were a myriad voices to be raised, no ear would listen if upon a fatherless child hath been conferred Prophethood.

luke/1.bible_quote: The Holy Ghost shall come upon thee...and the power of the Highest shall overshadow thee; therefore that Holy thing which shall be born of thee shall be called the Son of God.
luke/1.note: In the Kitab-i-Iqan Baha'u'llah upholds the purity and innocence of the Virgin Mary.

luke/1.bible_quote: The Holy Ghost shall come upon thee and the power of the Highest shall overshadow thee; therefore that Holy thing which shall be born of thee shall be called the Son of God.
luke/1.note: If Muhammadans and Christians would investigate the truth the outcome would be unity.

luke/1.bible_quote: Fear not, Mary...thou shalt conceive in thy womb, and bring forth a son and shalt call His name Jesus.
luke/1.note: Jesus' Reality from heaven, his body earthly.  Literal interpretation veiled the truth from the Jews.

luke/1.bible_quote: The Holy Ghost shall come over thee and the power of the Highest shall overshadow thee; therefore also the Holy thing which shall be born of thee shall be called the Son of God.
luke/1.note: Jesus came to the world through the power of God, born of the Holy Spirit and of the blessed Virgin Mary.  Mary His mother was a saint from heaven...God made Mary to be exalted above all other women.

luke/1.bible_quote: The Holy ghost shall come upon thee...the holy thing which shall be born of thee shall be called the Son of God.
luke/1.note: The people of Islam were taught to realize how Jesus came from God and was born of the Spirit and that He must be glorified of all men.

luke/1.bible_quote: The Holy ghost shall come upon thee...he shall be called the Son of God.
luke/1.note: How was Christ born of the Holy Ghost?  (Answered)

luke/1.bible_quote: And the Angel answered and said unto her, the Holy Ghost shall come upon thee and the power of the Highest shall overshadow thee; therefore the Holy thing which shall be born of thee shall be called t
luke/1.note: The Christ is born of the Holy Spirit; He is raised up by the Holy Spirit; He is a descendant of the Holy Spirit; the Reality of Christ does not descend from Adam.  Christ is a quickening Spirit.

luke/1.ref: Star of the West, VIII:8, p. 98
luke/1.bible_quote: And the Angel answered and said unto her....that Holy thing which shall be born shall be called the Son of God.
luke/1.note: Christ was born of the Holy Spirit.  He was the sun and His rays shone upon His disciples through His teachings...

luke/1.ref: Star of the West, XVII:10, p. 328
luke/1.bible_quote: And the Angel said unto her...the Holy thing that shall be born of thee shall be called the Son of God.
luke/1.note: In the Qur'an it states that Jesus Christ came into the world through the quickening breaths of the Holy Spirit...O Arabians, you must believe in Jesus Christ as a product of the Holy Spirit.

luke/1.bible_quote: And the Angel answered and said unto her...that Holy thing which shall be born of thee shall be called the Son of God.
luke/1.note: In reality Jesus did descend from heaven although He was born of Mary.  He was a heavenly man.

luke/1.ref: The Promised Day is Come, p. 113
luke/1.bible_quote: And the Angel answered and said unto her...that Holy thing which shall be born of thee shall be called the Son of God.
luke/1.note: Baha'u'llah designated Jesus as One who appeared out of the breath of the Holy Ghost.

luke/2.bible_quote: Glory to God in the highest and on earth peace and good will towards men.
luke/2.note: Abdul-Baha saw in a radiant vision the world of the future when the divine Message having become comprehended by men of good will would change the heart of the world.

luke/2.bible_quote: And she brought forth her firstborn son...
luke/2.note: Though Jesus said He came from heaven, many knew that He was born of Mary.

luke/2.bible_quote: And she brought forth her first born son...
luke/2.note: Thou born of Mary, the Christ was the divine spirit sent down from heaven.  So will the Second Coming be.

luke/2.ref: Star of the West, XV:5, p. 135 (Tablet)
luke/2.bible_quote: And she brought forth her first born and wrapped Him in swaddling clothes and laid Him in a manger.
luke/2.note: Although He was of such poor and humble condition that He was born in a manger, yet He changed the whole world by His power and divinity.  How can anyone deny His proof?  Baha'u'llah did not go to school yet much knowledge was manifest in Him...

luke/2.ref: Star of the West, XXIII:9, p. 266
luke/2.bible_quote: she brought forth her first born son...
luke/2.note: Christ's birthday is a glorious day.  The advent of Christ was a blessed day, for it was the day on which the Sun of Reality dawned; the day on which all beings were revivified.

luke/2.ref: Ten Days in the Light of Acca, p. 32
luke/2.bible_quote: And she brought forth her first born son, and laid Him in a manger.
luke/2.note: Jesus Christ was so poor that he was born in a manger yet He changed the conditions of the world--proof of His manifestationship.

luke/2.bible_quote: Glory to God in the highest, and on earth peace, good will to men.
luke/2.note: Prophecy of world peace.  Abdu'l-Baha saw a radiant vision the world of the future when the Divine Message having become comprehended by men of good will would change the heart of the world...

luke/2.bible_quote: And it came to pass after three days they found Him in the Temple, sitting in the midst of the doctors, both hearing them and asking them questions.  And all that heard Him were astonished at His unde
luke/2.note: 'Abdu'l-Baha pleaded with the Muhammadans to investigate the truth concerning Jesus in the Qur'an and the Bible.  If Muhammadans and Christians would investigate truth the outcome would be unity.

luke/3.ref: Ten Days in the Light of Acca, p. 45
luke/3.bible_quote: the Word of God came unto John...in the wilderness.  And he came into all the country about Jordan preaching the baptism of repentance for the remission of sins.
luke/3.note: Elijah came but was not recognized in John...not the entity of Elijah but his qualities that John embodied...

luke/3.bible_quote: And he came into all the country about Jordan, preaching the baptism of repentance for the remission of sins.
luke/3.note: Yahya is John the Baptist, the Wrod is Jesus and the message is: Repent for the Kingdom of Heaven is at hand.

luke/3.bible_quote: And he came into all the country about Jordan, preaching the baptism of repentance for the remission of sins.
luke/3.note: Baptism...

luke/3.ref: Ten Days in the Light of Acca, p. 36
luke/3.bible_quote: The voice of one crying in the wilderness, Prepare ye the way of the Lord...
luke/3.note: Each Manifestation came after a herald.  Ahmad and Kazim were forerunners, before the Manifestations of this Day.

luke/3.bible_quote: As it is written in the Book of Esaias, John came preaching the baptism of repentance...
luke/3.note: Return of the personality or of individuality is denied but return of perfections in Elijah and John the Baptist.

luke/3.bible_quote: O generation of vipers, who hath warned you?
luke/3.note: Behold how this wronged One is now surrounded by a generation of vipers.  He is summoning all men to Him, warning the heedless.

luke/3.bible_quote: I baptize you with water but one mightier than I cometh...He shall baptize you with the Holy Ghost and with fire.
luke/3.note: This spirit of faith is the flame of reality, the life of humanity and the cause of eternal illumination.

luke/3.bible_quote: he shall baptize you with the Holy Ghost and with fire.
luke/3.note: Baptism and fire are one.  By the fire of the love of God the veil is burnt which separates us from Heavenly realities.

luke/3.bible_quote: I indeed baptize you with water, but one mightier than I is coming.  He shall baptize you with the Holy Ghost and with fire...
luke/3.note: He who is baptized by the Holy Spirit is a manifestation of divine mercy to mankind.

luke/3.bible_quote: one mightier than I...He shall baptize you with the Holy Ghost and with fire.
luke/3.note: Christ appeared in order to illumine the world of humanity...to enkindle the light of love in human hearts.

luke/3.ref: Star of the West, IX:9, p. 103
luke/3.bible_quote: I indeed baptize you with water; but one mightier than I cometh...He shall baptize you with the Holy Ghost and with fire.
luke/3.note: Water symbolizes the knowledge of God which gives eternal life because all life had its beginning in water.  John baptized with water, symbol of purity...These are ceremonies which have spiritual meaning but no spiritual effect upon the soul...

luke/3.bible_quote: the heaven was opened and the Holy Ghost descended in a bodily shape, like a dove...
luke/3.note: Most Great Spirit designated by Baha'u'llah symbolized in Christian Dispensation as the Dove.

luke/3.bible_quote: the heaven was opened.  And the Holy Ghost descended...like a dove and a voice said, Thou art My beloved Son...
luke/3.note: The call of Baha'u'llah surpassed the annunciation to Jesus Christ at His Baptism.

luke/3.bible_quote: Jesus also being baptized and praying, the heaven was opened.  And the Holy Ghost descended in bodily shape like a dove upon Him...
luke/3.note: The descent of a dove upon Jesus Christ symbolic of the Annunciation of the angel to Baha'u'llah regarding His mission.

luke/3.bible_quote: it came to pass, that Jesus also being baptized, and praying the heaven was opened...
luke/3.note: Christ desired this institution to be used at this time so He Himself conformed to it.

luke/3.bible_quote: Jesus also being baptized and praying, the heaven was opened.  And the Holy Ghost descended in a bodily shape like a dove upon Him...
luke/3.note: Two-fold nature of Manifestations.  Before His baptism the Holy Spirit did not manifest itself in Him.  Explanation of human, and as One with God.

luke/3.bible_quote: And the Holy Ghost descended in a bodily shape like a dove upon Him, and a voice came from heaven which said, Thou art My beloved Son...
luke/3.note: God conferred upon that Essence of the Spirit, Who was known amongst the people as fatherless, the glory of Prophethood, and made Him His testimony unto all that are in heaven and on earth.

luke/3.bible_quote: and the Holy Ghost descended in a bodily shape like a dove...and a voice said, Thou art My beloved Son...
luke/3.note: Baha'u'llah declared the divines did not know the station of Jesus Christ.

luke/3.ref: The Promised Day is Come, p. 113
luke/3.bible_quote: and the Holy Ghost descended...and a voice came from heaven, which said, Thou art My beloved Son...
luke/3.note: The sonship of Jesus Christ asserted by Baha'u'llah.

luke/3.bible_quote: And the Holy Ghost descended in a bodily shape like a dove...
luke/3.note: This is not a material dove...it was a spiritual state expressed by a figure.  Symbolism abounds in the Scriptures.

luke/3.bible_quote: and a voice came from heaven, which said, Thou art My beloved Son...
luke/3.note: The sonship station is the heart of Christ, and the Holy Spirit is the station of the Spirit of Christ.

luke/3.ref: Star of the West, XIV:9, p. 274
luke/3.bible_quote: And the Holy Ghost descended in a bodily shape like a dove...
luke/3.note: The story about the dove is simply a metaphor.  No dove came down.  The Holy Spirit was always with Christ.  He knew about His mission from early childhood.

luke/3.ref: Ten Days in the Light of Acca, p. 45
luke/3.bible_quote: and a voice came from heaven, which said, Thou art My beloved Son...
luke/3.note: Manifestations are expected but when the come, they are rejected because of the blindness of people.

luke/4.ref: Star of the West, IV:18, p. 305
luke/4.bible_quote: and Jesus being full of the Holy Spirit was led by the Spirit into the wilderness...Being fourty days tempted of the devil.  And in those days He did eat nothing...
luke/4.note: In the beginning the disciples and Christians fasted.  Later they changed fasting into lenten observances...

luke/4.bible_quote: And He came to Nazareth where He had been brought up.
luke/4.note: The body of Christ was born of Mary of Nazareth but the Spirit was of God...the strength of His Spirit was immeasurable.

luke/4.bible_quote: And He came to Nazareth, where He had been brought up...
luke/4.note: The Jews, knowing He lived in Nazareth would not accept His statement that He came down from Heaven.

luke/4.ref: Star of the West, IV:1, p. 14 (*)
luke/4.bible_quote: The Spirit of the Lord is upon Me because He hath annointed Me...and all they in the synagogue, when they heard these things, were filled with wrath and rose up and thrust Him out of the city.
luke/4.note: Open your minds, the Spirit standeth behind them. (*Baha'u'llah, Lawh-i-Aqdas)

luke/4.bible_quote: And he came down to Capernaum...and taught them on the Sabbath days.  And they were astonished at His doctrine, for His word was with power.
luke/4.note: Christ was an educator.  He taught mankind by the power of the Holy Spirit.  His teachings were altruistic; His bestowal universal.

luke/4.bible_quote: And they were all amazed and spoke among themselves saying, What a word is this; for with authority and power He commandeth the unclean spirits and they come out...
luke/4.note: His Holiness Jesus Christ was a real physician.  Prophets of God are real physicians--the prescribe for human conditions...whoever is healed by that remedy finds eternal health...

luke/4.ref: Ten Days in the Light of Acca, p. 103
luke/4.bible_quote: Jesus healed them.  And devils also came out of many saying, Thou art Christ...
luke/4.note: The effect of a manifestation is to drive out all that is evil and replace the natural growth of virtues...

luke/5.ref: The Promised Day is Come, p. 31

luke/5.note: Through the aid and assistance of God they became mighty ones of God.  Peter was transformed.

luke/5.note: Peter had no education.  He was transformed by the power of the Holy Spirit.  He who is educated by the Holy Spirit can in turn educate others. (*From discourses in Paris and London)

luke/5.ref: Star of the West, XI:15, p. 258 (*)

luke/5.note: The Apostles were fishers.  Consider to what a high station they did rise.  Their sovereignty runs to eternity (*Tablet to Roy C. Williams [Wilhelm?])

luke/5.ref: 'Abdu'l-Baha on Divine Philosophy, p. 89
luke/5.bible_quote: For he was astonished...at the draught of the fishes...Jesus said unto Simon...from henceforth thou shalt catch men.
luke/5.note: Through the power of the Holy Spirit these simple fishermen were able to do what philosophers and scientists failed to accomplish.

luke/5.ref: The Advent of Divine Justice, p. 38

luke/5.note: Peter was the first Apostle to be called.  Observe how this crude and helpless instrument was transformed by the power of the Christ.  How much greater the power of the Father in Baha'u'llah.

luke/5.ref: God Passes By, p. 210
luke/5.bible_quote: And Jesus said unto Simon, Fear not; from henceforth thou shalt catch men.
luke/5.note: Baha'u'llah gives a greater promise to His followers than that of Jesus to Peter.

luke/5.ref: The Promised Day is Come, p. 110
luke/5.bible_quote: And Jesus said unto Simon, Fear not; from henceforth thou shalt catch men.
luke/5.note: Jesus said, Come after Me and I will make you to become fishers of men.  In this day We say, Come ye after Me that We may make you to become quickeners of mankind.

luke/5.ref: The Promised Day is Come, p. 124
luke/5.bible_quote: and Jesus said unto Simon, Fear not; from henceforth thou shalt catch men.
luke/5.note: Baha'u'llah asserts...fishers of men, individual; quickeners of mankind, universal.

luke/5.bible_quote: And Jesus said unto Simon, Fear not; from henceforth thou shalt catch men.
luke/5.note: Many common souls and the most degraded advanced and followed the divine Manifestations.  Everyone testifies that the learned philosophers and nobles of every nation were humble in the presence of the Blessed Beauty, and great numbers of these becami

luke/5.ref: Star of the West, X:3, p. 39 (*)
luke/5.bible_quote: And Jesus said unto Simon, Fear not; from henceforth thou shalt catch men.
luke/5.note: Do not look at present condition, contemplate the future.  Insgnificant persons--how great they became!  Bounties of Baha'u'llah shall in the future be made manifest.  (*Tablet to Mrs. Agnes Parsons,1/8/1919, translated by Shoghi Effendi)

luke/5.ref: Star of the West, XIII:7, p. 173 (DMAS)
luke/5.bible_quote: And Jesus said unto Simon, Fear not; from henceforth thou shalt catch men.
luke/5.note: Unity and concord is their bait: service and self-sacrifice is their sport.  Let the Baha'is be the fishermen of the sea of spirituality.  Let them not lose their courage...

luke/5.bible_quote: And when they had brought their ships to land they forsook all and followed Him.
luke/5.note: After the baptism of the Holy Spirit Peter became a great preacher. (*Tablet to American Baha'i)

luke/5.note: Jesus Christ renewed the Commandments.

luke/5.ref: Promulgation of Universal Peace, p. 195
luke/5.bible_quote: God and show thyself to the priest and offer for thy cleansing according as Moses commanded, for a testimony unto them.
luke/5.note: Jesus spread the name of Moses throughout the Orient and Occident.  We must investigate reality--banish heresay from our minds.

luke/5.ref: Star of the West, XVI:9, p. 633 (*)
luke/5.bible_quote: Go and show thyself to the priest and offer for thy cleansing according as Moses commanded, for a testimony unto them.
luke/5.note: When Jesus Christ appeared amongst the Jews, the first thing He did was to proclaim the validity of the Mosaic Mission.  He declared that the Torah, the Old Testament was the Word of God... (*Bahai Scriptures, p. 729)

luke/5.ref: The True Gardener, p. 6
luke/5.bible_quote: And He charged him to tell no man...
luke/5.note: If you give the same teachings to all some might be retarded by them instead of helped.

luke/5.ref: Kitab-i-Iqan, p. 134
luke/5.bible_quote: Whether it is easier to say, Thy sins be forgiven thee; or to say, Rise up and walk...know that the Son of man hath power on earth to forgive sins...
luke/5.note: This is the real sovereignty and such is God's power in His Chosen Ones.

luke/5.ref: Epistle to the Son of the Wolf, p. 48
luke/5.bible_quote: Pharisees began to reason, saying, Who can forgive sins but God alone?
luke/5.note: Analogy between the doctors disputing and rejecting Jesus and the divines rejecting Baha'u'llah.

luke/5.ref: Gleanings, p. 86
luke/5.bible_quote: But that ye may know that the Son of man hath power upon earth to forgive sins...
luke/5.note: Forgiveness was granted through Jesus Christ.  Miracles are spiritual.

luke/5.ref: The Promised Day is Come, p. 110
