luke/18.bible_quote: For it is easier for a camel to go through a needle's eye than for a rich man to enter into the kingdom of God.
luke/18.note: The rich depend on riches, whereas the poor are dependent on God.

luke/18.ref: Star of the West, VIII:2, p. 19 (*)
luke/18.bible_quote: For it is easier for a camel to go through a needle's eye than for a rich man to enter into the Kingdom of God.
luke/18.note: Blessed is the rich man whose wealth and oppulence do not prevent him from turning his face towards God, and whose heart is not attached to his possessions.  Such a rich man is the light of the world. (*DMAS, 2/24/1914)

luke/19.note: Jesus Christ manifested Himself in Jerusalem and invited men to eternal life.

luke/19.bible_quote: And they brought him to Jesus and they cast their garments upon the colt, and they set Jesus thereon, and as they went they spread their clothes in the way.
luke/19.note: How many awaited the coming of the Messiah and yet when He appeared they followed the superstitions of the Pharisees.

luke/19.bible_quote: And they brought Him the colt and they cast their garments upon the colt and they set Jesus thereon, and as He went they spread their clothes in the way.
luke/19.note: But those who had clear insight regarding even the ass on which He was mounted as a splendid throne...and the thorns which were upon His head as a brilliant diadem.

luke/19.bible_quote: And he taught daily in the Temple, but the chief priests and the scribes sought to destroy Him.
luke/19.note: The Jews rejected Jesus; they were blind to reality of Christ.  Literal interpretation of prophecies veiled them.

luke/20.ref: Star of the West, IV:12, p. 203 (*)
luke/20.bible_quote: He sat down and the twelve Apostles with Him...And He took break and gave thanks and brake it and gave unto them.
luke/20.note: Inasmuch as there was present the material bread and likewise heavenly Manna which was descending upon them, it was verily the Lord's Supper. (*Talk at nineteen day feast, home of Mrs. Helen S. Goodall, 10/16/1912)

luke/20.bible_quote: So they cast Him out of the vineyard and killed Him.  What therefore shall the Lord of the vineyard do unto them?
luke/20.note: 'Abdu'l-Baha uses this incident as an illustration of sedition and Covenant-breaking.  Covenant-breakers are execrated and condemned.

luke/20.bible_quote: Parable of the husbandman...What therefore shall the Lord of the Vineyard do unto them?
luke/20.note: Jesus Christ referred to Baha'u'llah as the Lord of the Vineyard and as the Son of man who shall come in the glory of His Father.

luke/20.bible_quote: Parable of the husbandman...What therefore shall the Lord of the Vineyard do unto them?
luke/20.note: Baha'u'llah identifies Himself with the Promised Father.

luke/20.ref: The World Order of Baha'u'llah, p. 205
luke/20.bible_quote: The parable of the husbandman...What therefore shall the Lord of the Vineyard do unto them?
luke/20.note: Baha'u'llah is in the station of judge...His warning to evil doers.

luke/20.bible_quote: The stone which the builders rejected the same is become the head of the corner.
luke/20.note: This is the experience of the Manifestations of God.

luke/20.bible_quote: the chief priests and the scribes sought to lay hands on Him...
luke/20.note: The Jews were awaiting the Messiah...when He came Jews rejected Him.  The same in the case of Baha'u'llah.

luke/20.ref: Epistle to the Son of the Wolf, p. 81
luke/20.bible_quote: Render therefore unto Caesar the things which be Caesar's and unto God the things which be God's.
luke/20.note: Baha'u'llah explained that to obey the rulers is to obey God.

luke/20.ref: Epistle to the Son of the Wolf, p. 89
luke/20.bible_quote: Render unto Caesar the things which be Caesar's and unto God the things that be God's.
Render unto Caesar the things which are Caesar's and unto God the things which be God's.
luke/20.note: Live so that the world may see you loyal to your just government and to God.  This is justice.

luke/20.ref: The Promised Day is Come, p. 73
luke/20.bible_quote: Render unto Caesar the things that are Caesar's and unto God the things that are God's.
luke/20.note: Baha'u'llah explained that to obey rulers is to obey God.

luke/20.ref: Star of the West, III:2, p. 7 (*)
luke/20.bible_quote: Render unto Caesar the things which be Caesar's and unto God the things that be God's.
luke/20.note: Religious interests should not be brought into politics.  Religions should treat of morals, politics of material circumstances. (*Discourses in London and Paris)
The call of Moses was surpassed by that of Baha'u'llah.

luke/20.bible_quote: even Moses shewed at the bush...
luke/20.note: Station of Baha'u'llah identified with that of Moses.

luke/21.bible_quote: then know that the desolation thereof is nigh...prophesied in the Book of Daniel...
luke/21.note: Desolation referred to by Christ ended by the Bab.

luke/21.bible_quote: desolation prophesied by prophet Daniel...know that the desolation thereof is nigh...
luke/21.note: The Bab ended this.

luke/21.bible_quote: and when ye shall see Jerusalem compassed with armies then know that the desolation thereof is nigh...Jerusalem shall be trodden down of the Gentiles, until the times of the Gentiles be fulfilled.
luke/21.note: We see in these days the fulfilment of divine prophecy.  Jerusalem had disappeared--now it is rebuilt...now its walls and pinacles have been restored and are towering aloft.

luke/21.bible_quote: And there shall be signs in the sun and in the moon and in the stars and upon the earth distress of nations...
luke/21.note: Every time He made reply He set forth a special sign that should herald the promised Dispensation.  To this testify the four Gospels.

luke/21.bible_quote: And there shall be signs in the sun and in the moon and in the stars and upon the earth distress of the nations.
luke/21.note: By the sun in one sense is meant the Suns of Truth Who fill the world with a liberal effusion of grace from on high...the universal Manifestations of God...

luke/21.bible_quote: And there shall be signs in the sun and in the moon and in the stars...
luke/21.note: Hence it is manifest that by the words the sun shall be darkened and the moon shall not give her light and the stars shall fall is intended the waywardness of the divines and the annulment of laws established by divine Revelation...

luke/21.bible_quote: and there shall be signs in the sun and in the moon and in the stars, and upon the earth distress of nations...
luke/21.note: Explanations of its symbolism, meanings of sun, heaven, stars, moon, ark, morn...

luke/21.ref: Ten Days in the Light of Acca, p. 27
luke/21.bible_quote: And there shall be signs in the sun and in the moon and in the stars...
luke/21.note: Science proove that nearly all the stars are larger than the earth...the Kingdom of Heaven is within your soul...Symbolism of stars, heaven, etc.

luke/21.bible_quote: And there shall be signs in the sun and the moon and the stars and upon the earth distress of nations...then shall they see the Son of man coming in a cloud with power and great glory.
luke/21.note: By these words it is meant that when the sun of heavenly teachings hath been eclipsed, stars of divinely established laws have fallen and the moon of knowledge hath been obscured...the sign of the Son of man will appear in heaven.

luke/21.bible_quote: and then shall they see the Son of man coming in a cloud with power and great glory.
luke/21.note: Explanation of clouds, etc.

luke/21.bible_quote: And then shall they see the Son of man coming in a cloud with power and great glory.
luke/21.note: He Who is the Lord of Lords is come overshadowed with clouds and the decree hath been fulfilled.

luke/21.bible_quote: then shall they see the Son of man coming in a cloud with power and great glory...
luke/21.note: As clouds hide the sun so humanity of Christ hid His divine character.

luke/21.bible_quote: And then shall they see the son of man coming in a cloud with power and great glory.
luke/21.note: As clouds hid the sun, so the humanity of Christ hid His divine character.

luke/21.ref: The Promised Day is Come, p. 27
luke/21.bible_quote: then shall they see the Son of man coming in a cloud with power and great glory.
luke/21.note: Failure of kings of Christendom to draw near unto Baha'u'llah.

luke/21.ref: Star of the West, VIII:13, p. 180 (*)
luke/21.bible_quote: And then shall they see the Son of man coming in a cloud with power and great glory.
luke/21.note: The human temple, like unto a cloud, prevents people from beholding the rays of the Sun. Explanation of symbolism, clouds, sun, etc.  (*Centennial of birth of Baha'u'llah; Tablet for Mirza Abu'l-Fadl, 6/4/1902?, Washington,D.C.)

luke/21.ref: Star of the West, X:12, p. 232 (*)
luke/21.bible_quote: Then shall they see the coming of the Son of man coming in a cloud with power and great glory...Watch ye therefore and pray always that ye may be accounted worthy to escape all these things that shall
luke/21.note: All these things refer to the Century of the Blessed Beauty. (*Tablet to Mrs. Annie Parmerton, Cincinnati, Ohio)

luke/21.bible_quote: And then shall they see the Son of man coming in a cloud with power and great glory.
luke/21.note: the clouds are vapors which rise from the earth...The cloud mentioned in the Holy Scriptures is the human body, a veil preventing them from seeing the Christ.

luke/21.bible_quote: And then shall they see the Son of man coming in a cloud with power and great glory.
luke/21.note: Clouds are obstacles...the human body was the obstacle that prevented Jews from seeing the Christ.  They see the body but not the Spirit.

luke/21.bible_quote: Verily I say unto you, This generation shall not pass away till all be fulfilled.
luke/21.note: The meaning, there are two generations, physical and spiritual.  Christ was speaking of the spiritual generation...

luke/21.ref: Daily Lessons received at Acca, p. 53
luke/21.bible_quote: Verily I say unto you, This generation shall not pass away till all be fulfilled.
luke/21.note: Generation has a different meaning in different places.  In this verse it means Dispensation, the Christian Dispensation.

luke/23.bible_quote: And the chief priests and scribes stood and vehemently accused Him.
luke/23.note: Reflect how the Pharisees persecuted Christ.  The result was that His lamp became ignited; His Light began to shine.

luke/23.ref: Epistle to the Son of the Wolf, p. 81
luke/23.bible_quote: And they began to accuse Him saying, We found this fellow perverting the nation and forbidding to give tribute to Caesar saying that He Himself is Christ, a King.
luke/23.note: Baha'u'llah explains that to obey rulers is to obey God.

luke/23.bible_quote: the chief priests and scribes...accused Him, and Herod set Him at nought and mocked Him...Pilate said, I will chastise Him...
luke/23.note: The Manifestations met with fierce opposition by the divines.  Reflect how Jesus was treated by His enemies.

luke/23.bible_quote: the chief priests and scribes...accused Him, and Herod set Him at nought, and mocked Him...Pilate said, I will chastise Him...
luke/23.note: Manifestations have been opposed by the embodiment of the powers of darkness.

luke/23.bible_quote: The chief priests and scribes vehemently accused Him.  Herod and his men of war mocked Him, arrayed Him in a gorgeous robe and sent Him to Pilate...
luke/23.note: There was no abuse and persecution which they did not heap upon Him.  The Jews did not investigate reality.  It is incumbent to investigate reality.  Man must examine truth, when he finds it he must hold to it.

luke/23.bible_quote: the chief priests and scribes accused Him, and Herod set Him at nought...Pilate said, I will chastise Him...
luke/23.note: All Prophets were scorned and persecuted.  Jesus was rejected, tortured.

luke/23.ref: Ten Days in the Light of Acca, p. 19
luke/23.bible_quote: the chief priests and scribes accused Him, and Herod set Him at nought...when they were come to Calvary there they crucified Him.
luke/23.note: The enemies of Christ persecuted and crucified Him, yet He loved them all.  If the love of God is shining in our hearts we will love all alike.

luke/23.ref: Ten Days in the Light of Acca, p. 31
luke/23.bible_quote: the chief priests and scribes accused Him and Herod set Him at nought and mocked Him...
luke/23.note: All the Prophets of God were scorned and persecuted.  Men have worshipped the personality but were blind to the reality, truth.

luke/23.bible_quote: And the chief priests and scribes vehemently accused Him.  And Herod...mocked Him...
luke/23.note: The Jews did not know the meaning of the prophecies.  Literal interpretation veiled the true meaning.  They mocked Him, spat in His Holy Face and shed His pure blood.

luke/23.bible_quote: And Herod with his men of war set Him at nought, and mocked Him and arrayed Him in a gorgeous robe and sent Him again to Pilate.
luke/23.note: God, however, aided Him and protected Him...Thy Lord preserveth whom He willeth...

luke/23.ref: Epistle to the Son of the Wolf, p. 100
luke/23.bible_quote: and Herod and his men of war set Him at nought...mocked Him and sent Him again to Pilate...
luke/23.note: Baha'u'llah recalled the sufferings of Jesus Christ and old Prophets caused by divines.

luke/23.bible_quote: And Herod and his men of war set Him at nought...mocked Him and sent Him again to Pilate...
luke/23.note: Baha'u'llah recalled in anticipation of His own lot the suffering of Jesus Christ.

luke/23.ref: Star of the West, IV:9, p. 156 (*)
luke/23.bible_quote: And Herod with his men of war set Him at naught and mocked Him...
luke/23.note: He endured all things so that the world might unite and that he might cement the hearts of men through His love. (*Address in Stuttgart, 4/6/1913)

luke/23.ref: Star of the West, IX:15, p. 171 (*)
luke/23.bible_quote: And herod with his men of war set Him at naught and mocked Him.
luke/23.note: Later on it became manifest that He was the light of truth and was bestowing the spirit of eternal life.  No Prophet cometh unto them but they laugh Him to scorn. (*Tablet to Juanita Storch)

luke/23.ref: Star of the West, XXII:9, p. 258
luke/23.bible_quote: And Herod with his men of war set Him at naught and mocked Him...
luke/23.note: He was mocked, scorned and laughed at yet His Mission was to uplift the very world that refused Him.  Christ was always Christ.

luke/23.bible_quote: And the chief priests and scribes stood and vehemently accused Him, and Herod...set Him at naught and mocked Him...
luke/23.note: Literal interpretation blinded the eyesight of the Jews and they rejected the One they had been looking for.

luke/23.bible_quote: But they cried, crucify Him...And Pilate gave sentence that it should be as they required.
luke/23.note: The Jews did not understand, therefore they were debarred from perceiving the truth of Christ.

luke/23.bible_quote: and when they were come to Calvary, there they crucified Him.
luke/23.note: Jews rose against Jesus Christ even to the shedding of His blood.  Had they investigated reality they would have accepted their promised Messiah, Jesus Christ. Blind imitations and hereditary prejudices causes of hatred and war.

luke/23.bible_quote: when they were come to Calvary, there they crucified Him.
luke/23.note: Literal interpretation blinded the Jews and prevented them from seeing the Beauty of Christ.  They rejected Him and crucified Him.

luke/23.ref: Epistle to the Son of the Wolf, p. 100
luke/23.bible_quote: and when they were close to Calvary, there they crucified Him.
luke/23.note: Suffering of Jesus Christ at the hands of the Jews similar to the suffering of other martyrs.

luke/23.bible_quote: Calvary, there they crucified Him.
luke/23.note: No death of religion founder comparable to that of the Bab except in Gospels

luke/23.bible_quote: And when they were come to Calvary, there they crucified Him.
luke/23.note: Crucifixion of Jesus Christ compared by Baha'u'llah to the stoning death of Mirza Mihdi.

luke/23.bible_quote: And when they were come to Calvary, there they crucified Him.
luke/23.note: Jews expected Messiah to be a Prince of Peace; because He did not meet the conditions, they crucified Him.

luke/23.bible_quote: and when they were come to Calvary, there they crucified Him.
luke/23.note: Christ suffered.  He accepted all His trials because of the immortality of His spirit.

luke/23.bible_quote: When they were come to Calvary, there they crucified Him.
luke/23.note: at length He gave His life in sacrifice for humanity...His heart was full of love for all the world, His goodness was destined to reach each one...as they began to realize these things they repented...but He had been crucified.

luke/23.bible_quote: When they were come to Calvary, there they crucified Him.
luke/23.note: Christ suffered unto death to bring Light...All prophets of god came to promote unity.

luke/23.bible_quote: And when they were come to Calvary, there they crucified Him.
luke/23.note: Jesus gave His life that this world might be released from discord and strife.

luke/23.bible_quote: and when they were come to Calvary, there they crucified Him.
luke/23.note: His Holiness Jesus Christ gave His life upon the cross for the unity of mankind.

luke/23.bible_quote: and when they were come to Calvary there they crucified Him.
luke/23.note: may you offer yourselves in the threshold of sacrifice for the betterment of the world.

luke/23.bible_quote: And when they were come to the place which is called Calvary there they crucified Him.
luke/23.note: They did this because they did not investigate truth.

luke/23.bible_quote: and when they were come to Calvary there they crucified Him.
luke/23.note: The Talmud and its superstitions veiled His Holiness so completely that they crucified their promised Messiah.

luke/23.bible_quote: Calvary, there they crucified Him.
luke/23.note: They arose against Him even to the extreme of shedding His blood.

luke/23.bible_quote: Calvary, there they crucified Him.
luke/23.note: Blind imitations and hereditary prejudices have become the cause of hatred...therefore we must seek truth...

luke/23.bible_quote: Calvary, there they crucified Him.
luke/23.note: because they held fast to ancestral imitations they were deprived.  Jews crucified Jesus.  Consider how harmful is imitation.  We must investigate truth.

luke/23.bible_quote: Calvary, there they crucified Him.
luke/23.note: The Jews rejected and tortured Jesus, notwithstanding all Jesus Christ is glorified.  Although men arose against Him and the Kingdom, God's dominion is eternal and is victorious.

luke/23.bible_quote: Calvary, there they crucified Him.
luke/23.note: All prophets of God were persecuted.  Jesus Christ accepted martyrdom in order to summon mankind to unity and love.  It is the divine purpose of religion.

luke/23.bible_quote: Calvary, there they crucified Him.
luke/23.note: Jesus Christ, the Bab and Baha'u'llah suffered for mankind because of their love...likewise all the Prophets.

luke/23.bible_quote: Calvary, there they crucified Him.
luke/23.note: Because they were blindly following imitations, the Jews rejected Jesus.  They refused to investigate truth.

luke/23.bible_quote: Calvary, there they crucified Him.
luke/23.note: If the Jews had investigated the reality of Christ they would have beheld His truth.  They were withheld because of bigoted imitation.  They were arrogant towards Him and crucified Him.

luke/23.bible_quote: Calvary, there they crucified Him.
luke/23.note: Comparison of behavior of Peter and Mary Magdalene, a proof that woman is equivalent and a complement of man.

luke/23.bible_quote: Calvary, there they crucified Him.
luke/23.note: Before the appearance in human form, the Word of God was in the utmost sanctity and glory...when it shone in the body it fell into the hands of the Jews and became the captive of the tyrannical and was crucified.

luke/23.bible_quote: Calvary, there they crucified Him.
luke/23.note: He arose to teach and educate men and so He sacrificed Himself to give the spirit of life.  He perished in body so as to quicken others by His spirit.

luke/23.ref: Star of the West, IV:1, p. 14 (*)
luke/23.bible_quote: Calvary, there they crucified Him.
luke/23.note: Remember the most learned doctors of His country, in His age, condemned Him to be killed, whilst one who was a catcher of fishes believed in Him. (*Lawh-i-Aqdas, Baha'u'llah)

luke/23.ref: Star of the West, IV:2, p. 40 (*)
luke/23.bible_quote: Calvary, there they crucified Him.
luke/23.note: He sacrificed His life that the oil in the lamps of our souls might become ignited and His light shine from them. (*Talk 6/11/1912, New York)

luke/23.ref: Star of the West, V:11, p. 169
luke/23.bible_quote: Calvary, there they crucified Him.
luke/23.note: They crucified their promised Messiah...

luke/23.ref: Star of the West, XV:9, p. 254 (*)
luke/23.bible_quote: Calvary, there they crucified Him.
luke/23.note: Jesus Christ gave His life on the cross for the unity of mankind.  Only a few were attracted to Him but with this small army He conquered the world. (*Address)

luke/23.ref: Star of the West, XVI:9, p. 633 (*)
luke/23.bible_quote: Calvary, there they crucified Him.
luke/23.note: Some Jews cried, O God, hasten the Day when the Promised One will manifest Himself...When He came they knew Him not...they could not see the reality of Christ... (*Bahai Scriptures, p. 729-30)

luke/23.bible_quote: Calvary, there they crucified Him.
luke/23.note: The body of Jesus Christ was crucified but His Spirit is always pouring upon the world...

luke/23.ref: Ten Days in the Light of Acca, p. 31
luke/23.bible_quote: Calvary, there they crucified Him.
luke/23.note: All Manifestations have been denied and persecuted; men have worshipped the personality but were blind to their Reality...Truth.

luke/23.bible_quote: Calvary, there they crucified Him.
luke/23.note: The crucifixion was the means of spreading the light of the Cause of God.

luke/23.bible_quote: Calvary, there they crucified Him.
luke/23.note: In the time of Jesus cruelty and tyranny such that people crucified even Jesus.  Literal interpretation veiled the truth from the Jews.  They had no knowledge of the symbolism of the Scriptures.

luke/23.ref: Utterances in letter of H.E.Hoagg to Mrs. I.D.(*)
luke/23.bible_quote: Calvary, there they crucified Him.
luke/23.note: The Jewish clergy were busy creating doubts in the minds of the people...He was crucified.  Therefore they say Jesus was a false prophet. (*Brittingham, 1/1914, Haifa, translated by Monever Khanum)

luke/23.bible_quote: Then said Jesus, Father, forgive them for they know not what they do.
luke/23.note: Thus He pardoned His murderers.  How merciful He was!

luke/23.bible_quote: Then Jesus said, Father, forgive them, for they know not what they do.
luke/23.note: Wars are anti-Christ.  A real Christian is to go forth under His banner of peace and love.

luke/23.bible_quote: Father, forgive them for they know not what they do.
luke/23.note: We must emulate the Prophets of God.  We must follow Jesus.

luke/23.bible_quote: Father, forgive them, for they know not what they do.
luke/23.note: Justice and mercy of God explained.

luke/23.ref: Star of the West, IX:19, p. 222
luke/23.bible_quote: Father, forgive them for the they know not what they do.
luke/23.note: Jesus had the power of interceding for the forgiveness of His enemies...By the mercy of God, not through His justice, the condition of those who have died in sin and unbelief can be changed. The power of effective intercession always exists.

luke/23.ref: Ten Days in the Light of Acca, p. 13
luke/23.bible_quote: And the soldiers also mocked Him...
luke/23.note: The world must come to know the Word in Christ.  His mission was to uplift the very world which refused Him.

luke/24.bible_quote: And they found the stone rolled away from the sepulchre...He is not here but is risen.
luke/24.note: As Christ came from a spiritual heaven of the Divine Kingdom, therefore His disappearance under the earth for three days has an inner signification and is not an outward fact.

luke/24.ref: Daily Lessons received at Acca, p. 62
luke/24.bible_quote: Why seek ye the living among the dead?  He is not here but is risen.
luke/24.note: Because it is in the clear literal text, it is believed...symbolism explained.

luke/24.ref: Star of the West, X:17, p. 307 (Tablet*)
luke/24.bible_quote: Why seek ye the living among the dead?  He is risen.  They returned from the sepulchre and told all these things unto the eleven.  It was Mary Magdalene and Joanna and Mary the Mother of Jesus.
luke/24.note: Laster it became evident what crowns studded with brilliant jewels of guidance were placed on the heads of Mary Magdalene and the other Mary, the Mother of Jesus. (*Unveiling of Divine Plan for the Islands of the Sea, read at 1919 Convention)

luke/24.bible_quote: He is not here, but is risen.
luke/24.note: Resurrection is symbolic, a spiritual fact.

luke/24.bible_quote: And returned from the sepulchre and told all these things unto the eleven...
luke/24.note: Mary Magdalene was superior to all the men of her time.  She gathered the others together and said, Why do ye mourn?  Her reality is shining from the horizon of Christ.

luke/24.ref: Flowers culled...Rose Garden at Acca, p. 15 (*)
luke/24.bible_quote: They returned from the sepulchre and told all these things unto the eleven...and their words seemed to them as idle tales and they believed them not.
luke/24.note: From Mary Magdalene Jesus cast out seven devils.  Observe her transformation and glory after she believed in Christ. (*Talk 11/10/1908, Akka)

luke/24.bible_quote: It was Mary Magdalene, and Joanna and Mary the Mother of Jesus...which told these things unto the apostles.
luke/24.note: Mary Magdalene strengthened the disciples.  In the sight of God sex makes no difference.  He or she is greatest who is nearest to God.

luke/24.bible_quote: It was Mary Magdalene and Joanna and Mary the Mother of James and other women that were with them which told all these things unto the apostles.
luke/24.note: Comparison between Peter and Mary.  Mary Magdalene an example of the capability of women.  Baha'u'llah emancipated women.

luke/24.bible_quote: It was Mary Magdalene...and other women that were with them which told these things to the disciples.  And their words seemed to them as idle tales and they believed them not.
luke/24.note: Mary Magdalene was of a lowly type, yet Mary transformed and became the means through which the confirmations of God descended upon the disciples...

luke/24.bible_quote: It was Mary Magdalene...and other women that were with them which told these things unto the apostles, and their words seemed to them as idle tales and they believed them not.
luke/24.note: Christ had twelve disciples, Judas became a traitor, the remainder were wavering.  It is certain that the one who re-established their faith was Mary Magdalene.  The world consists of two factors, male and female.  Each is the complement of the other.

luke/24.bible_quote: It was Mary Magdalene...and other women which told these things unto the apostles.  And their words seemed to them as idle tales and they believed them not.
luke/24.note: Mary Magdalene's faith never wavered but the disciples wavered.

luke/24.ref: Ten Days in the Light of Acca, p. 17
luke/24.bible_quote: It was Mary Magdalene...and other women which told these things unto the apostles...and their words seemed to them as idle tales and they believed them not.
luke/24.note: Mary Magdalene held firmly to the Christ and made others firm.  God will assist all who are firm in His Cause.

luke/24.ref: Star of the West, VII:11, p. 108
luke/24.bible_quote: And they gave Him a piece of a broiled fish and of an honeycomb and He took it and did eat before them.
luke/24.note: Resurrection was a spiritual resurrection.  All should be understood in spiritual terms.  Meaning of symbols...

luke/24.ref: Flowers culled...Rose Garden at Acca, p. 28 (*)
luke/24.bible_quote: All things must be fulfilled which were written in the Law of Moses and in the Prophets and in the Psalms concerning Me.
luke/24.note: Jesus Christ said, I am the Promised One in your books. (*Mirza Haydar 'Ali, 11/11/1908, Akka)

luke/24.ref: The Principle of Religious Unity, p. 4
luke/24.bible_quote: All things must be fulfilled, which were written in the Law of Moses, and in the Prophets and in the Psalms concerning Me.
luke/24.note: Jesus Christ proclaimed and ratified the prophethood of Moses.

luke/24.bible_quote: All things must be fulfilled which were written in the Law of Moses and in the Prophets and in the Psalms concerning Me.
luke/24.note: Christ caused the name and prestige of Moses to become widespread.  Through Christ Moses was proclaimed a Prophet of God.

luke/24.bible_quote: All things must be fulfilled which were written in the law of Moses and in the Prophets and in the Psalms concerning Me.
luke/24.note: Manifestations testify to oneness, therefore Jesus upheld the teachings and commandments of Moses.  Jews had become blind to the truth through bigoted imitation.

luke/24.bible_quote: All things must be fulfilled which were written in the Law of Moses, and in the Prophets and in the Psalms concerning Me.
luke/24.note: Christ ratified and proclaimed the Law of Moses.  All Prophets have revoiced that same foundation of reality.

luke/24.bible_quote: All things must be fulfilled which were written in the Law of Moses and in the Prophets and in the Psalms concerning Me.
luke/24.note: Jesus Christ declares Moses to have been a Prophet...through Christ the Old Testament, the Torah, was translated into 600 different tongues and spread throughout the world.

luke/24.bible_quote: All things must be fulfilled which were written in the Law of Moses, and in the Prophets and in the Psalms concerning Me.
luke/24.note: We have stated the valid proofs of the prophethood of Moses.  Jesus Christ was instrumental in publishing the name and greatness of the Israelitish Prophets, and proved to the world that the Israelites constituted the people of God.

luke/24.bible_quote: These are the words which I spake unto you while I was yet with you that all things must be fulfilled which were written in the Law of Moses, and in the Prophets and in the Psalms concerning Me.
luke/24.note: Through Jesus the name of Moses was elevated and revered.  He declared Moses to be a Prophet of God.

luke/24.bible_quote: All things must be fulfilled which were written in the Law of Moses and in the Prophets and in the Psalms concerning Me.
luke/24.note: If the Jews had understood the meanings of the Old Testament they would have become believers of Christ.

john/1.bible_quote: In the beginning was the Word...
john/1.note: Letters are meaningless, but a word has sense and meaning.  The Reality of Jesus Christ was the perfect meaning, the Christhood in Him, symbolized as the Word.

john/1.bible_quote: In the beginning was the Word...
john/1.note: Jesus Christ was God's conversation to us, His Revelation.

john/1.bible_quote: In the beginning was the Word...
john/1.note: The Spirit and the Word mean the divine perfections that appeared in the Reality of Christ...the perfections of Christ have the power of the word because a complete meaning can be inferred from a word.

john/1.ref: Star of thw Est, IV:3, p. 51 (*)
john/1.bible_quote: In the beginning was the Word...
john/1.note: Explanation of Trinity (*Answers to questions asked by theologians in Paris)

john/1.ref: Star of the West, XVI:1, p. 386 (*)
john/1.bible_quote: In the beginning was the Word...
john/1.note: The Holy Manifestations are Centers of the Light of Reality--they give spiritual life.  That is why it is said in the Gospel, In the beginning was the Word, meaning that it became the cause of life. (*Some Answered Questions, p. 185)

john/1.bible_quote: In the beginning was the Word...
john/1.note: The Word of God from all eternity has always been and will be in the exaltation of santification...

john/1.bible_quote: In the beginning was the Word...
john/1.note: That means it was, is and shall be, for in the world there is no time.

john/1.bible_quote: In the beginning was the Word...
john/1.note: The Holy Manifestations of God are the centers of the Light of Reality...it is said in the Gospel "in the beginning was the Word" meaning that it became the cause of all life.

john/1.bible_quote: In the beginning was the Word...
john/1.note: Explanation of meanings of these words.

john/1.bible_quote: In the beginning was the Word...the same came for a witness, to bear witness of that light...the Word was made flesh and dwelt among us...
john/1.note: Jesus rose, brightening the world until all sects and creeds and nations were taught the beauty of unity.

john/1.ref: The Promised Day is Come, p. 113
john/1.bible_quote: In the beginning was the Word...same came for a witness, to bear witness of the Light...
john/1.note: The divinity of Jesus Christ asserted by Baha'u'llah, and His sonship.

john/1.bible_quote: In the beginning was the Word...
john/1.note: By the word we mean that creation in its various forms is like letters but the station of Christ is the station of the Word...complete significance...

john/1.bible_quote: In the beginning was the Word...and the Word was made flesh and dwelt among us...
john/1.note: Baha'u'llah states that Muhammad was a Prophet of God, that Christ was the Word of God and Moses the Friend of God.  Baha'u'llah affirms the principles, spirit and reality of each religion.

john/1.bible_quote: In the beginning was the Word...and the Word was made flesh and dwelt among us...
john/1.note: Baha'u'llah's words of power were received by some; others despised and rejected Him, as the Jews did Jesus.

john/1.bible_quote: In the beginning was the Word...and the Word was made flesh and dwelt among us...
john/1.note: Those who believed that Jesus was the Word became disciples.  Faith consisted in blind acceptance of these truths.

john/1.bible_quote: In the beginning was the Word...and the Word was made flesh and dwelt among us...
john/1.note: The Christ was the Word of God from the beginning.

john/1.bible_quote: In the beginning was the Word...the Word was made flesh and dwelt among us...
john/1.note: The Reality of Christ was the embodiment of divine virtues and attributes of God.  He was the Word.  Christ was God made manifest, the conversation of God with man.

john/1.bible_quote: In the beginning was the Word...the Word was made flesh and dwelt among us...
john/1.note: The Reality of Christ, the Word of God, is a quickening spirit...

john/1.bible_quote: In the beginning was the Word...the Word was made flesh and dwelt among us...
john/1.note: Those who turned towards the Word of God and received His bounties were saved from sin and were delivered from the chains of bondage...

john/1.bible_quote: In the beginning was the Word...the Word was made flesh and dwelt among us...
john/1.note: Know that the attributes of perfection, splendor of divine bounties and lights of inspiration are visible and evident in all the Holy Manifestations.

john/1.ref: Star of the West, XVIII:9, p. 261 (*)
john/1.bible_quote: In the beginning was the Word...the Word was made flesh and dwelt with us...
john/1.note: The glory and exultation of Christ is as clear as the sun at midday from the books and tablets of His Holiness Baha'u'llah. (*Tablet)

john/1.ref: Star of the West, XXIII:9, p. 266
john/1.bible_quote: In the beginning was the Word...the Word was made flesh and dwelt among us...
john/1.note: Christ was a quickening spirit and the cause of life in all mankind, the Reality of Christ.

john/1.bible_quote: In the beginning was the Word...the Word was made flesh and dwelt among us...
john/1.note: Alas for the souls because of what they have committed against the Word of God, and today they worship the dust which the feet of His beloved have trod.

john/1.bible_quote: That was the true Light which lights every man that cometh into the world.  He was not that Light but was sent to bear witness of that Light.
john/1.note: Western lands have been kindled by the Light of Christ.  In the time of Christ there was an outpouring of Light from East to West...I pray, Light of this Age, will illumine the world...all receive spiritual education.

john/1.bible_quote: That was the true Light which lighteth every man that cometh into the world...
john/1.note: It was to manifest this Light that Baha'u'llah was born.  He shed rays of Divine Light in all lands.

john/1.bible_quote: But as many as received Him, to them gave He power to become the sons of God which were born not of blood, nor of the will of man but of God.
john/1.note: Being a disciple is not by physical power but by spiritual reality...they are from the heavenly Father's Will...

john/1.bible_quote: But as many as received Him, to them gave He power to become the sons of God, even to them that believe on His name, which were born, not of blood, nor of the will of the flesh, nor of the will of man
john/1.note: Delivered from animal characteristics and given divine characteristics...

john/1.bible_quote: And the Word was made flesh and dwelt among us...
john/1.note: Manifestations become flesh in order that with our earthly ears we should be able to hear and understand.

john/1.bible_quote: And the Word as made flesh and dwelt among us...
john/1.note: The reality of Christ, the Christhood symbolized as the Word...

john/1.bible_quote: And the Word was made flesh and dwelt among us...
john/1.note: The Word of God, the Reality of Christ...

john/1.ref: Star of the West, IX:2, p. 18 (*)
john/1.bible_quote: And the Word was made flesh and dwelt among us...
john/1.note: Now the Baha'is are proving in the Jewish synagogues that Christ is the Word of God. (*Talk in Akka, 12/17)

john/1.ref: Star of the West, XVII:10, p. 328
john/1.bible_quote: And the Word was made flesh and dwelt among us...
john/1.note: Muhammad in the Qur'an states that Jesus Christ was the Word of God...O Arabians, you must accept Jesus Christ as the Word of God.

john/1.bible_quote: No man hath seen God at any time, the only begotten Son, which is in the bosom of the Father...
john/1.note: Baha'is must have purity of character that others may be drawn close to the Father.

john/1.ref: The World Order of Baha'u'llah, p. 113
john/1.bible_quote: No man hath seen God at any time; the only begotten Son...he hath declared Him.
john/1.note: God will remain hidden from men, therefore He hath caused Manifestations to appear.

john/1.bible_quote: and they asked Him, What then? Art thou Elias? And he saith I am not.
john/1.note: Jesus Christ speaking of John the Baptist declared He was Elias...

john/1.bible_quote: when the Jews sent priests and Levites to ask him [John the Baptist] Who art thou?  And he confessed and denied not; but confessed, I am not the Christ...
john/1.note: Explanation of contradictory passages...

john/1.bible_quote: And they asked, What then? Art thou Elias? And he saith, I am not.
john/1.note: Explanation of contradictions...

john/1.bible_quote: and they asked, Art thou Elias? and he saith, I am not.
john/1.note: Explanation of return of perfections...

john/1.ref: Ten Days in the Light of Acca, p. 45
john/1.bible_quote: And they asked Him, Art thou Elias?  And He answered, I am not...I am the voice of one crying in the wilderness, Make straight the way of the Lord, as the prophet Esaias said.
john/1.note: Elijah came but was not recognized in John...not the entity but His qualities which John embodied.

john/1.bible_quote: I am the voice of the one crying in the wilderness, Make straight the way of the Lord as said the Prophet Esaias.
john/1.note: Yahya, John the Baptist, herald of the Word, gave message, Repent for the kingdom of God is at hand.

john/1.bible_quote: John answered them saying, I baptize with water.
john/1.note: Baptism has become a form...

john/1.ref: Star of the West, IX:9, p. 103
john/1.bible_quote: I baptize with water...He that sent me...the same is he which baptizeth with the Holy Ghost.
john/1.note: Symbolism is water is knowledge, fire is love.  When they were baptized they repented...their hearts were purified and ready to accept the teachings of the One John was declaring would come.  This ceremony has a spiritual meaning but not spiritual effect

john/1.ref: Ten Days in the Light of Acca, p. 36
john/1.bible_quote: I am the voice of one crying in the wilderness, Make straight the way of the Lord...
john/1.note: John the Baptist herald of Christ.  Ahmad and Kazim were the forerunners of the Manifestations of this Day.

john/1.ref: Flowers culled...Rose Garden at Acca, p. 8 (*)
john/1.bible_quote: And John bare record, saying, I saw the Spirit descending from heaven and it abode upon Him...And I saw and bare record that this is the Son of God.
john/1.note: Jesus Christ spoke of Himself as the Son of God. (*Munirih Khanum, 11/8/1908, Akka)

john/1.bible_quote: And John bare record saying, I saw the Spirit descending from heaven like a dove and it abode on Him.
john/1.note: The Call of Baha'u'llah surpassed that of Jesus Christ ast His baptism.

john/1.bible_quote: John bare record saying, I saw the Spirit descending from heaven like a dove and it abode on Him.
john/1.note: Most Great Spirit designated by Baha'u'llah as symbolized in Christian Dispensation by the dove.

john/1.bible_quote: I saw the Spirit descending from heaven like a dove and it abode upon Him...
john/1.note: The descend of a dove upon Jesus Christ symbolic of the annunciation of the angel to Baha'u'llah regarding His Mission.

john/1.bible_quote: and John bare record saying, I saw the Spirit descending like a dove and it abode on Him...
john/1.note: This was not a material dove, it was a spiritual state expressed by a figure.

john/1.bible_quote: And John bare record saying, I saw the Spirit descending from heaven like a dove...I saw and bare record that this is the Son of God.
john/1.note: Christ desired this institution to be used at that time...

john/1.bible_quote: And John bare record saying, I saw the Spirit descending...the same is he which baptizeth with the Holy Ghost.
john/1.note: The Sonship station is the heart of Christ, and the Holy Spirit is the station of the Spirit of Christ.

john/1.bible_quote: John bare record saying, I saw the Spirit descending from heaven like a dove...
john/1.note: Jesus was baptized as a man...he came forth with the Manifestation of God in His two-fold nature, the baptism of the Holy Spirit.

john/1.ref: Star of the West, XIV:9, p. 274
john/1.bible_quote: And John bare record saying, I saw the Spirit descending from heaven like a dove...
john/1.note: The story about the dove is simply a metaphor.  No dove came down. The Holy Spirit was always with Christ.  He knew about His Mission from early childhood.

john/1.bible_quote: Upon whom thou shalt see the Spirit descending and remaining on Him, the same is He which baptizeth with the Holy Ghost.
john/1.note: Christ says you must be baptized with the Spirit...This spirit of faith is the flame of reality...cause of eternal illumination.

john/1.bible_quote: Upon whom thou shalt see the Spirit descending and remaining upon Him, the same is He which baptizeth with the Holy Ghost...I bear record that this is the Son of God.
john/1.note: He who is baptized by the Holy Spirit is a Manifestation of divine mercy to mankind.

john/1.bible_quote: Upon whom thou shalt see the Spirit descending...the same is he which baptizeth with the Holy Ghost.
john/1.note: Christ appeared in order to illumine the world of humanity...to enkindle the light of love in human souls.  Through Christ they were intended to be baptized by the Holy Spirit, attain a new spirit and realize life everlasting.

john/1.bible_quote: Upon whom thou shalt see the Spirit descending...the same is He which baptizeth with the Holy Ghost.  And I saw and bare record that this is the Son of God.
john/1.note: Before this the Holy Spirit did not manifest itself in Him.  Humanly the Manifestations are unaware of certain things but their heavenly condition embraces all mysteries...

john/1.bible_quote: And I saw and bare record that this is the Son of God...
john/1.note: God conferred upon that Essence of the Spirit, Who was known amongst the people as fatherless, the glory of Prophethood and made Him His testimony unto all that are in heaven and on earth.

john/1.bible_quote: and I saw, and bare record that this is the Son of God.
john/1.note: The Sonship of Jesus Christ asserted by Baha'u'llah.

john/1.ref: Ten Days in the Light of Acca, p. 45
john/1.bible_quote: And I saw and bare record, that this is the Son of God.
john/1.note: Manifestations are expected but when They come, they are rejected because of the blindness of the people.

john/1.bible_quote: Names of the disciples.
john/1.note: Jesus really had only eleven disciples as Judas had an evil heart and betrayed Him.

john/1.bible_quote: Names of the apostles of Christ.
john/1.note: Consider the days of Christ, how the light of guidance brightened twelve hearts.  The lamp of guidance has been lighted in your hearts.

john/1.bible_quote: Names of the twelve disciples.
john/1.note: Only eleven became apostles of Jesus Christ; they illumined the world.  Similar conditions in Paris, little by little the Cause grew.

john/1.bible_quote: Names of twelve disciples.
john/1.note: In each cycle the guardians or holy souls have been twelve.  So in the time of Christ there were twelve apostles.

john/1.ref: The Advent of Divine Justice, p. 38
john/1.bible_quote: Thou art Simon the son of Jonah; thou shalt be called Cephas, which is by interpretation, a stone.
john/1.note: At first Peter was crude and helpless, according to the history of the Church he was rendered fit to become Jesus Christ's successor and founder of His church.

john/1.ref: Ten Days in the Light of Acca, p. 17
john/1.bible_quote: Names of the twelve disciples.
john/1.note: Twelve believed in Him; one deserted Him...others were not strong.  God will assist all who are firm in the Cause.

john/1.ref: Ten Days in the Light of Acca, p. 17
john/1.bible_quote: And Nathaniel said, Can there any good thing come out of Nazareth?  Philip said unto him, Come and see.
john/1.note: Christ appeared in Palestine and was held in contempt because he was from Nazareth.

john/13.bible_quote: Jesus saith...Ye are not all clean.  For He knew who should betray Him.
john/13.note: Jesus really had only eleven disciples as Judas had an evil heart and betrayed Him.

john/13.bible_quote: The supper being ended He riseth...and began to wash the disciples' feet.
john/13.note: Designated the Lord's Supper.  They at heavenly food at that supper--the love, knowledge, mysteries and bestowals of God.

john/13.bible_quote: And the supper being ended...He riseth from supper...began to wash the disciples' feet.
john/13.note: You have written regarding the Feast of Remembrance [nineteen day feast]...This arrangement of affection...causeth everlasting life...

john/13.ref: Ten Days in the Light of Acca, p. 91
john/13.bible_quote: He riseth from supper...took a towel, and girdeth Himself...and began to wash the disciples' feet.
john/13.note: Christ was the example of Servitude and Love...the disciples followed Him.  One must live it to teach it.

john/13.bible_quote: A new commandment I give unto you, That ye love one another as I have loved you, that ye also love one another.
john/13.note: Christ was the embodiment of pity, goodness and love.  His heart was full of love for all mankind.

john/13.bible_quote: A new commandment I give unto you, That ye love one another as I have loved you; by this shall all men know that ye are My disciples if ye have love one to another.
john/13.note: Love is the fundamental principle of God's purpose for man and He has commanded us to love one another as He loves us...

john/13.bible_quote: A new commandment I give unto you, That ye love one another as I have loved you, that ye also love one another.
john/13.note: To be a real Christian is to be a servant in His Cause and Kingdom, to go forth under His banner of peace and love...in all things to be like Him...filled with the spirit of His love.

john/13.ref: Star of the West, XVI:9, p. 156 (*)
john/13.bible_quote: A new commandment I give unto you, That ye love one another as I have loved you, that ye also love one another.
john/13.note: He endured all things...that He might cement the hearts of men through His love... (*Address in Stuttgart, Germany, 4/1913)

john/13.ref: Star of the West, XVI:9, p. 634
john/13.bible_quote: A new commandment I give unto you, That ye love one another as I have loved you, that ye also love one another.
john/13.note: If His Holiness Christ had not possessed love for the world of humanity surely He would not have welcomed the cross.  If His Holiness Baha'u'llah had not been aflame with love for humanity He would not have willingly accepted forty years' imprisonment

john/13.bible_quote: A new commandment I give unto you, That ye love one another; as I have loved you that ye also love one another.
john/13.note: If His Holiness Christ has not possessed love for the world of humanity surely He would not have welcomed the cross.  If His Holiness Baha'u'llah had not been aflame with love for humanity He would not have willingly accepted forty years' imprisonment

john/2.bible_quote: Jesus saith unto her, Woman, what have I to do with thee?  Mine hour is not yet come...Fill the waterpots with water...
john/2.note: Mary desired He would speak something that would exhilerate their spirits, like wine for the body.  Water, in its spiritual interpretation is the cause fo life.  For everything there is a special time.

john/2.ref: Star of the West, IV:1, p. 18
john/2.bible_quote: Jesus found in the Temple those that sold oxen...and the changers of money sitting; and when He had made a scourge of small cords, He drove them all out...He said unto them, Make not My Father's house

john/4.note: Water is the cause of life, and when Christ speaks of water He is symbolizing that which is the cause of everlasting life...it is none other than the love of God...

john/5.note: The Jews said the Messiah was to spread the Law of Moses, but Jesus seeks to destroy it.  They were blind to Reality.

john/5.bible_quote: Therefore did the Jews persecute Jesus and sought to slay Him because He had done these things on the Sabbath Day.

john/5.bible_quote: And therefore did the Jews persecute Jesus, and sought to slay Him because He had done these things on the Sabbath Day.

john/5.bible_quote: Therefore did the Jews persecute Jesus and sought to slay Him because He had done those things on the Sabbath Day.

john/5.note: Manifestations change the material laws in conformity with needs and conditions of the times.  The Jews were veiled from Reality by ancestral traditions.

john/5.bible_quote: Therefore the Jews sought...to kill Him because He not only had broken the Sabbath, but said also that God was His Father...
john/5.note: Jews rejected Jesus because He did not observe according to their practices based on narrow interpretation.

john/5.bible_quote: Therefore the Jews sought to kill Him because He not only had broken the Sabbath, but said also that God was His Father...
john/5.note: The Jews rejected Jesus because He did not observe it according to their practices based on narrow interpretations of the Scriptures.

john/5.bible_quote: the Jews sought to kill Him because He not only had broken the Sabbath, but said that God was His Father...
john/5.note: His Holiness Christ proclaimed and completed the Law of Moses.  He abolished laws which were not in accord with the needs of the times.  Because of adherence to old teachings, the Jews denounced Him.

john/5.bible_quote: The Jews sought the more to kill Him, because He not only had broken the Sabbath, but said that God was His Father...
john/5.note: Manifestations change some of the laws of the Jews--which they called the Law of Moses.  Altered according to the exigencies of the times.

john/5.bible_quote: Therefore the Jews sought the more to kill Him, because He not only had broken the Sabbath but said also that God was His Father...
john/5.note: The Jews did not understand, therefore they were debarred from perceiving the truth of Christ.

john/5.bible_quote: there is one that accuseth you, even Moses in whom ye trust, for had ye believed Moses, ye would have believed Me, for He wrote of Me.
john/5.note: Manifestations testify to oneness, therefore Jesus upheld the teachings and commandments of Moses.  The Jews had become blind to truth through bigoted imitation.

john/5.bible_quote: there is one that accuseth you, even Moses in whom ye trust, for had ye believed in Moses, ye would have believed in Me, for He wrote of Me.

john/5.bible_quote: there is one that accuseth you, even Moses, in whom ye trust, for had ye believed Moses ye would have believed Me, for He wrote of Me.
john/5.note: Christ caused the name and prestige of Moses to become widespread.  Through Christ Moses was proclaimed a Prophet of God.

john/5.bible_quote: there is one that accuseth you, even Moses, in whom ye trust; for had ye believed Moses, ye would have believed Me, for He wrote of Me.
john/5.note: Literal interpretation and attention to unimportant things interfered with their knowledge of the reality of Jesus Christ.  Veiled by traditions in the Talmud.

john/5.bible_quote: for had ye believed in Moses, ye would have believed in Me, for He wrote of Me.

john/14.bible_quote: He that hath seen Me hath seen the Father.

john/14.bible_quote: Jesus said unto him [Philip], He that hath seen Me hath seen the Father...
john/14.note: Christ was like a clear mirror which was facing the Sun of Reality.

john/14.ref: Daily Lessons received at Acca, p. 35
john/14.bible_quote: Believe Me that I am in the Father and the Father in Me...
john/14.note: Manifestations are like mirrors and the Essence is like the Sun.  The Sun has been reflected by the mirror of Christ.

john/14.bible_quote: Believe Me that I am in the Father and the Father in Me.
john/14.note: Man is made in God's image...that is what was meant when God said: "Let Us create man in Our image."  In the Gospel Christ said: "I am in the Father and the Father in Me."

john/14.bible_quote: I will pray the Father and He shall give you...the Spirit of Truth...
john/14.note: Baha'u'llah identifies Himself with the Spirit of Truth.

john/14.bible_quote: Even the Spirit of Truth whom the world cannot receive...
john/14.note: Baha'u'llah censured Kings of Christendom for failing to welcome the Spirit of Truth.

john/14.bible_quote: He that hath My commandments, and keepeth them, he it is that loveth Me; and He that loveth Me shall be loved of My Father and I will love him and will manifest myself unto him.
john/14.note: Until love takes possession of the heart, no other divine bounty can be revealed in it.

john/14.ref: The Advent of Divine Justice, p. 65
john/14.bible_quote: But the Counsellor, which is the Holy Ghost...He shall teach you all things...
john/14.note: The Day of Promise is come, and He Who is the Promised One...allusions were made to it in all Scriptures.

john/14.bible_quote: the Comforter, which is the Holy Ghost...He shall teach you all things...
john/14.note: Baha'u'llah identifies Himself with the promised Comforter.

john/14.bible_quote: Peace I leave with you, My peace I give unto you; not as the world giveth, give I unto you.
john/14.note: Peoples of the world cannot promulgate and spread a Cause but one Holy Soul can promote it without help; Christ alone...upraised the standard of spiritual peace...

john/14.bible_quote: Peace I leave with you, My peace I give unto you...
john/14.note: man needs to wish for eternal life, and then confer the same upon another.  These perfections are the peace promosed and spoken of by Christ.

john/14.bible_quote: I go away and come again unto you.
john/14.note: In the Qur'an both the Book and the Cause of Jesus were confirmed.

john/14.bible_quote: I go away and come again unto you...When He, the Spirit of Truth is come, He will guide you into all truth...
john/14.note: Both of these sayings have but one meaning.  Manifestations of the Unity of God have Divine insight.

john/14.bible_quote: I go away and come again unto you.
john/14.note: Jesus Christ, His Return in a Promised One, Baha'u'llah.

john/14.bible_quote: I go away and come again unto you.
john/14.note: Baha'u'llah asked the Kings why they failed to recognize the return of Christ.

john/14.ref: The Promised Day is Come, p. 26
john/14.bible_quote: I go away, and come again unto you.
john/14.note: Baha'u'llah recalled to the Kings that Jesus foretold that He would come again.

john/14.bible_quote: for the prince of this world cometh.
john/14.note: Prophecy of the coming of Baha'u'llah by Jesus Christ.

john/14.ref: Visit to Acca, Mary Lucas, p. 39-40
john/14.bible_quote: And I will pray the Father, and He will give you another Comforter, that He may abide with you forever, even the Spirit of Truth, Whom the world cannot receive...
john/14.note: Christians explain these refer to the Holy Spirit.  There must be a man who can hear and reveal what the Holy Spirit tells Him.  Not direct but through an Intermediary, Baha'u'llah.

john/14.ref: Visit to Acca, Mary Lucas, p. 39-40
john/14.bible_quote: I will not longer talk much with you, for the prince of this world is coming...
john/14.note: Christians explain these refer to the Holy Spirit.  There must be a man who can hear and reveal what the Holy Spirit tells Him.  Not direct but through an Intermediary, Baha'u'llah.

john/16.note: Both of these sayings have but one meaning.  Manifestations of the Unity of God have Divine insight.

john/16.bible_quote: When He, the Spirit of Truth is come, He shall guide you into all truth...
john/16.note: When He did bring the truth, ye refused Him.  Ye continue roving with delight in your corrupt desires.  You will be called to account for your doings.

john/16.ref: Visit to Acca, Mary Lucas, p. 39-40
john/16.bible_quote: It is to your advantage that I go away; for if I do not go away, the Comforter will not come to you...
john/16.note: Christians explain these refer to the Holy Spirit.  There must be a man who can hear and reveal what the Holy Spirit tells him.  Not direct but through an Intermediary, Baha'u'llah.

john/16.ref: Visit to Acca, Mary Lucas, p. 39-40
john/16.bible_quote: These things I have spoken to you in figurative language; but the time is coming when I will no longer speak to you in figurative language, but I will tell you plainly about the Father.
john/16.note: Christians explain these refer to the Holy Spirit.  There must be a man who can hear and reveal what the Holy Spirit tells Him.  Not direct but through an Intermediary, Baha'u'llah.

john/16.bible_quote: It is expediant for you that I go away; for if I go not away, the Comforter will not come unto you; but if I depart I will send Him unto you.
john/16.note: Jesus Christ caused the disciples to grieve over His saying, "I go away", but He comforted them with His promise of Another.

john/16.bible_quote: if I go not away the Comforter will not come unto you...
john/16.note: Had the Jews understood symbolism they would have understood the Christ...It is essential to have divine perception...

john/16.bible_quote: if I depart I will send Him unto you...when He is come He will guide you into all truth...
john/16.note: Jesus Christ foretold His Return in a Counsellor Who would reveal all truth...Baha'u'llah fulfilled this.

john/16.bible_quote: I will send the Counsellor unto you...when He is come He will guide you into all truth...
john/16.note: Baha'u'llah was to come to guide mankind into all truth.

john/16.bible_quote: if I depart I will send Him unto you...
john/16.note: Baha'u'llah identifies Himself with the promised Comforter.

john/16.bible_quote: when He is come, He will reprove the world of sin, and of righteousness and of judgment.
john/16.note: Fulfilled in Baha'u'llah.

john/16.ref: Epistle to the Son of the Wolf, p. 148
john/16.bible_quote: I have many things to say unto you but ye cannot bear them now...when He the Spirit of Truth is come He will guide you into all truth...
john/16.note: Baha'u'llah declared that most of these things have been announced by His pen.

john/16.bible_quote: I have yet many things to say unto you but ye cannot bear them now, Howbeit when He, the Spirit of Truth is come, He will guide you into all truth.
john/16.note: The teachings of Jesus are in a concentrated form, as a flower in the bud.  Today the bud is unfolding into a flower.  Baha'u'llah has expanded and fulfilled the Teachings and has applied them in detail to the whole world.

john/16.bible_quote: I have yet many things to say unto you...when He the Spirit of Truth is come, He will guide you into all truth.
john/16.note: The Manifestation is the great Physician for healing humanity's ailments.

john/16.bible_quote: I have yet many things to say unto you but ye cannot bear them now.  Howbeit when He, the Spirit of Truth is come, He will guide you into all truth.
john/16.note: This refers to Baha'u'llah.

john/16.bible_quote: I have yet many things to say unto you but ye cannot bear them now.  Howbeit when He, the Spirit of Truth is come, He will guide you into all truth.
john/16.note: The time is come to establish the real foundations of Christianity.

john/16.bible_quote: when He, the Spirit of Truth is come, He will guide you into all truth...
john/16.note: Baha'u'llah declares to Christians that the Promised One is come.

john/16.ref: Ten Days in the Light of Acca, p. 35
john/16.bible_quote: A little while and ye shall not see Me and again a little while and ye shall see Me because I go to the Father.
john/16.note: I am nothing but the Servant of God.  Some in America are looking for a third Christ or personage.  This is only imagination.  Some call me Christ.  This is also imagination.

john/16.bible_quote: I came forth from the Father and am come into the world...
john/16.note: The body of Christ was born of Mary of Nazareth, but the Spirit was of God.  The capacities of His human body were limited but the strength of His spirit was vast, infinite, immeasurable...

john/16.bible_quote: I came forth from the Father, and am come into the world again...
john/16.note: If they had understood the Reality of Christ, they would have known that the body os His humanity was a cloud that hid His Divinity.  The world only saw His human form, and therefore wondered how He could have come down from heaven.

john/16.bible_quote: I came forth from the Father and am come into the world...
john/16.note: Jews, knowing that Jesus lived in Nazareth would not accept His statement that He came from heaven.

john/16.bible_quote: I came forth from the Father and am come into the world.
john/16.note: The Divine Reality of Christ came from heaven but the body was born of Mary.  Literal interpretation veils truth.

john/16.ref: Star of the West, XIII:5, p. 115
john/16.bible_quote: I came forth from the Father and am come into the world.
john/16.note: I will show you the meaning of: His body was born of Mary but His Spirit came from heaven...

john/16.bible_quote: I came forth from the Father and am come into the world...
john/16.note: all nations were expecting that Christ should come from heaven and He did though outwardly He came from Mary...Now people expect Him to come from heaven.

john/16.ref: Ten Days in the Light of Acca, p. 32
john/16.bible_quote: I came forth from the Father and came into the world.
john/16.note: He was so poor that He was born in a manger; yet He changed the condition of the whole world.  What proof could be greater than this that He was from God?

john/16.bible_quote: I came forth from the Father and am come into the world...
john/16.note: Because the people did not know the meaning of heaven they would not believe that He came from heaven.

john/16.bible_quote: Now are we sure that Thou knowest all things...by this we believe that Thou camest forth from God.
john/16.note: The product of the life of Christ was the illumined souls of those who believed in Him.

john/15.ref: Star of the West, VIII:11, p. 139 (*)
john/15.bible_quote: This is My commandment, that ye love one another as I have loved you.
john/15.note: All the Prophets were sent, all the Books were revealed so that the law of love might be promoted. (*Talk in DMAS, 6/10/1914, in The Divine Art of Living)

john/15.ref: Flowers culled...Rose Garden at Acca, p. 27
john/15.bible_quote: Greater love hath no man than this, that a man lay down his life for his friends.
john/15.note: Jesus gave His life for mankind.  He proved His own teaching; people believed then obeyed, then found deliverance from sin.

john/15.bible_quote: But when the Comforter is come whom I will send unto you from the Father, even the Spirit of Truth...He shall testify of Me.
john/15.note: To Him [Baha'u'llah] Jesus Christ had referred as "The Comforter"..."Spirit of Truth"...

john/15.bible_quote: I will send unto you from the Father...the Spirit of Truth, which proceedeth from the Father...
john/15.note: Baha'u'llah identifies Himself with the promised Spirit of Truth...Baha'u'llah asserts that Jesus Christ was the Herald of His Mission.

john/15.bible_quote: when the Comforter is come, Whom I will send unto you from the Father, even the Spirit of Truth...
john/15.note: Baha'u'llah censured the Kings of Christendom for failure to welcome the Spirit of Truth.

john/15.bible_quote: when the Comforter is come, Whom I will send unto you from the Father...He shall testify of Me...
john/15.note: I am the One Whose name both the Torah and the Evangel have adorned. (Baha'u'llah quoted)

john/17.bible_quote: These words spake Jesus...Father the hour is come; glorify Thy Son that Thy Son may also glorify Thee.
john/17.note: Baha'u'llah declared the divines did not know the station of Jesus Christ.

john/17.bible_quote: Father, the hour is come; glorify Thy Son, that Thy Son also may glorify Thee...
john/17.note: As to the question of the Trinity, that in each one of the cycles there are necessarily three things: Look at the Messianic cycle: the Father and the Son and the Holy Ghost the Intermediary.

john/17.bible_quote: I have glorified Thee on earth.  I have finished the word which Thou gavest Me to do.  I have manifested Thy name.
john/17.note: Muhammad recognized the truth of the signs, prophecies and words of Jesus and testified that they were all of God.

john/17.bible_quote: I have glorified Thee on earth...I have manifested Thy name unto men which Thou gavest Me out of the world.
john/17.note: the Reality of Christ is an unlimited essence.  His Holiness Christ appeared in order to enkindle the light of love in human souls, to unite the hearts...

john/17.ref: Star of the West, XVI:9, p. 634 (*)
john/17.bible_quote: I have glorified Thee on earth...I have manifested Thy name unto the men which Thou gavest Me out of the world.
john/17.note: Those who looked to the spiritual and real existence of the Spirit of Christ firmly believed in Hi8m.  We must not look at the lantern but at the light. (*Bahai Scriptures, p. 959)

john/17.ref: Star of the West, XXIII:9, p. 266 (*)
john/17.bible_quote: I have glorified Thee on earth...for their sakes I sanctify Myself...and the glory which Thou gavest Me I have given them.
john/17.note: The position of Christ was that of absolute perfection...the Reality of Christ was a clear mirror of the greatest purity and fineness.  The Essence of Oneness became visible in the mirror. (*Some Answered Questions, p. 136)

john/17.ref: Epistle to the Son of the Wolf, p. 50
john/17.bible_quote: And now, O Father, glorify Me with thine own Self with the glory which I had with Thee before the world was.
john/17.note: Baha'u'llah declared the divines did not know the station of Jesus Christ.

john/17.bible_quote: O Father, glorify Me with Thine own Self with the glory which I had with Thee before the world was.
john/17.note: If they had understood the Reality of Christ they would have known the body of His humanity was a cloud that hid His...

john/17.bible_quote: O Father, glorify Thou Me with Thine own Self with the glory which I had with Thee before the world was.
john/17.note: The throne of Jesus Christ was a heavenly throne.  The Jews could not understand this...prophecies concerning Christ were fulfilled but Jews shut their eyes and their ears...the Divine Reality of Christ...unheard, unloved and unrecognized...

john/17.bible_quote: And now, O Father, glorify Thou Me with Thine own Self with the glory which I had with Thee before the world was.
john/17.note: His Holiness was heavenly...and belonged to the world of the Kingdom.  He was illumined with love and mercy and so likewise were all the Prophets of God.

john/17.bible_quote: And now, O Father, glorify Thou Me with Thine own Self with the glory which I had with Thee before the world was.
john/17.note: Before appearing in human form, the Word of God was in...splendor in the light of its magnificence.  When it shone in the world of the body, it fell into the hands of the Jews and was crucified.

john/17.bible_quote: And now, O Father, glorify Thou Me with Thine own Self with the glory which I had with Thee before the world was.
john/17.note: The glorious Word of God, and the Greatest Name Baha'u'llah, are manifestations and evidences beyond imagination.  What a difference between the Word of God and revelations of Isaiah, Jeremiah and Elijah!

john/17.bible_quote: O Father, glorify Thou Me with Thine own Self with the glory which I had with Thee before the world was.
john/17.note: The Word of God from all eternity has always been and will be in the exaltation of sanctification.

john/17.bible_quote: And now, O Father, glorify Thou Me with Thine own Self with the glory which I had with Thee before the world was.
john/17.note: The Manifestations of universal Prophethood who appeared independently are Abraham, Moses, Christ, Muhammad, the Bab and Baha'u'llah.

john/17.bible_quote: And now, O Father, glorify Thou Me with Thine own Self with the glory which I had with Thee before the world was.
john/17.note: for the dominion of the reality of Christ there is no beginning and no end.  This dominion is eternal...has no abrupt end.

john/17.bible_quote: I have manifested Thy name unto the men which Thou gavest Me...I have given unto them the Words which Thou gavest Me and they have received them...and have known that Thou didst send Me.
john/17.note: The City [of Certitude] is none other than the Word of God revealed in every age and dispensation; in the days of Moses it was the Pentateuch; in the days of Jesus the Gospel...

john/17.bible_quote: I have manifested Thy name unto the men which Thou gavest Me out of the world...
john/17.note: When they followed Christ and believed in Him they became spiritual and divine...they became sons of God, they became saints.  Strive to follow in their steps...

john/17.bible_quote: I have manifested Thy name unto the men which Thou gavest Me out of the world...
john/17.note: All of them were men of the least consequence in the eyes of the world.  But their hearts were pure and attracted by the fires of the divine spirit manifested in Christ.

john/17.bible_quote: I have manifested Thy name...For I have given unto them the words which Thou gavest Me and they have received them...
john/17.note: Therefore it is shown that the Manifestations, the holy mouthpieces of God are the Collective Centers of God.  Collective Centers, Abraham, Moses, Jesus Christ, Muhammad.  Today Baha'u'llah is the Collective Center of unity of all mankind.

john/17.bible_quote: I have manifested Thy name...and for their sakes I sanctify Myself that they also might be sanctified through the truth.
john/17.note: Today we behold His manifest signs; His light; His sovereignty is established; His traces are apparent; His bounties are effulgent.

john/17.bible_quote: I have given them words which Thou gavest Me and they have received them...I have given them Thy Word...
john/17.note: The grand aim of the religion of Christ was to draw the hearts of all men to God's effulgent Truth.

john/17.bible_quote: For I have given them the Words which Thou gavest Me and they have received them...
john/17.note: The traces of the Spirit of Jesus Christ, the influence of His Divine Teachings is present with us today and is everlasting.

john/17.bible_quote: For I have given them the words which Thou gavest Me and they have received them...
john/17.note: All the Manifestations of God came with the same purpose and they all sought to lead men into the paths of virtue.  Why do we not love one another and live in unity?

john/17.bible_quote: For I have given them the Words which Thou gavest Me and they have received them...As Thou hast sent Me into the world, even so I have sent them into the world.
john/17.note: Consider the influence of Jesus Christ on His apostles and their effect upon the world.  These simple men were enabled by the power of the Holy Spirit to spread the glad tidings.

john/17.bible_quote: I have given unto them the Words which Thou gavest Me and they have received them.
john/17.note: His essential teaching was the unity of mankind and attainment of supreme human virtues through love.

john/17.bible_quote: For I have given them the Words which Thou gavest Me...I have given them Thy Word.
john/17.note: His Holiness Jesus Christ was an educator of humanity...His Teachings were altruistic, universal.  He taught by the power of the Holy Spirit...the essential teachings of Jesus Christ are the light of the world.

john/17.bible_quote: For I have given them the Words which Thou gavest Me; and they have received them...
john/17.note: His Holiness educated and quickened them with the life of the Word, so they in turn became the instruments of educating the world.  Consider the transformation of Peter.

john/17.ref: Ten Days in the Light of Acca, p. 32
john/17.bible_quote: I have given them the Words which Thou gavest Me and they have received them and have known surely that I came out from Thee...
john/17.note: The greatest proof of a Manifestation is the Manifestation Himself--God with all His qualities is independent of all His creatures, the sun is independent of Proof.

john/17.bible_quote: And now I am no more in the world...While I was with them in the world I kept them in Thy name...
john/17.note: The reality of Christ was always in heaven.  When we perceive the reality of Christ these symbolic statements become clear.  Establish the fact that the power of God is infinite, unlimited.

john/17.bible_quote: I pray not that Thou shouldst take them out of the world, but that Thou shouldst keep them from the evil.
john/17.note: These who were followers of Jesus detached their souls from the desires of the world and made their hearts to depend on the bounties of heaven.

john/17.bible_quote: And for their sakes I sanctify Myself that they might be sanctified through the truth...
john/17.note: Baha'u'llah came to renew the world with this new Springtime.  The world of the Occident should hold fast to the example of Jesus Christ.  Baha'u'llah has refreshed the Orient with His divine springtime in power and glory.

john/17.bible_quote: as Thou, Father, art in Me and I in Thee...
john/17.note: God conferred upon that Essence of the Spirit the glory of Prophethood and made Him His testimony unto all that are in heaven and on earth.

john/17.ref: Daily Lessons received at Acca, p. 22
