revelation/21.note: Refers to the new Divine Law over the entire earth.

revelation/21.ref: The World Order of Baha'u'llah, p. 205
revelation/21.bible_quote: and I saw a new heaven and a new earth...the holy city, new Jerusalem, coming down from heaven...
revelation/21.note: John prefigured the glory which humanity must witness.  The new Jerusalem, new Revelation which Baha'u'llah brought.

revelation/21.ref: Wisdom of 'Abdu'l-Baha,p.76;Paris Talks,p.84
revelation/21.bible_quote: And I, John, saw the holy city, new Jerusalem, coming down from God...
revelation/21.note: We are told in the Holy Scriptures that the New Jerusalem shall appear on the earth.  This means the coming again of the Divine Teachings...

revelation/21.ref: Paper by Shahnaz Waite (out of print #20)
revelation/21.bible_quote: And I saw a new heaven and a new earth...holy city, new Jerusalem, coming down from God...
revelation/21.note: Holy City, New Jerusalem is the Holy Book, the Law of God.  First heaven and earth is former law.  It will cover the earth, all men will enter the Cause of God.

revelation/21.ref: Paper by Shahnaz Waite (out of print #20)
revelation/21.bible_quote: and I saw a new heaven and a new earth...the holy city, New Jerusalem coming down from God...
revelation/21.note: In each divine Dispensation or cycle a new Book of laws is given...We are now living in the Day of Fulfilment of St. John's Revelation...through Baha'u'llah.

revelation/21.ref: Baha'i World Faith, p. 381
revelation/21.bible_quote: the Holy city, new Jerusalem, coming down from God...
revelation/21.note: The descend of the New Jerusalem is the heavenly religion which secures the prosperity of the human world...effulgence of the illumination of the realm of God.

revelation/21.ref: The Advent of Divine Justice, p. 65
revelation/21.bible_quote: new Jerusalem, which cometh down out of heaven from my God...
revelation/21.note: In this mighty Revelation is the perfect expression of whatsoever peoples have said or written sent from Will of God.

revelation/21.ref: Baha'i World Faith, p. 350-51
revelation/21.bible_quote: new heaven and new earth...holy city, new Jerusalem, coming down from God...
revelation/21.note: The New Heaven and the New Earth, first seven verses interpreted...the Revelation of St. John the Divine...revealed the coming of Baha'u'llah.

revelation/21.ref: Promulgation of Universal Peace, p. 17
revelation/21.bible_quote: the holy city, new Jerusalem, coming down from God...
revelation/21.note: The voice of the Kingdom of God has been raised.  May you attain supreme capacity...

revelation/21.ref: Paper by Shahnaz Waite (out of print #20)
revelation/21.bible_quote: the Holy city, new Jerusalem, coming down from God...
revelation/21.note: The Law of God is also described as the Holy City, the New Jerusalem.  It is not a city of stone and mortar, bricks, earth and wood.  It is the Law of God that is renewed.

revelation/21.ref: God Passes By, p. 213
revelation/21.bible_quote: the Holy city, new Jerusalem, coming down from God...
revelation/21.note: This most Holy Book may be regarded as the Charter of Baha'u'llah's New World Order.

revelation/21.ref: God Passes By, p. 96
revelation/21.bible_quote: new heaven and earth...holy city, new Jerusalem, coming down from God...
revelation/21.note: Revelation of Baha'u'llah called new heaven and new earth, tabernacle of God, holy city...

revelation/21.ref: Star of the West, II:17, p. 4 (*)
revelation/21.bible_quote: holy city, new Jerusalem, coming down from God...
revelation/21.note: Divine teachings forgotten, Baha'u'llah's teachings are the new Jerusalem, spiritual not material. (*Address in Paris, 11/1911)

revelation/21.ref: Some Answered Questions, p. 77-78
revelation/21.bible_quote: holy city, new Jerusalem, coming down from God...prepared as a bride adorned for her husband.
revelation/21.note: Law of God, holy city, new Jerusalem, Words of Revelation, priceless jewels, like adorned bride.

revelation/21.ref: Promulgation of Universal Peace, p. 98]
revelation/21.bible_quote: holy city, new Jerusalem, coming down from God...
revelation/21.note: This is what in the Bible by the descent of the New Jerusalem...none other than the divine civilization and it is now ready...It shall be organized and the oneness of humankind will be a visible fact.

revelation/21.ref: Promulgation of Universal Peace, p. 35
revelation/21.bible_quote: holy city, new Jerusalem, coming down from God...
revelation/21.note: The day has come when all darkness is to be dispelled and the Sun of Truth shall shine forth radiantly...Jerusalem shall descend from heaven...

revelation/21.ref: TAB:III, p. 539
revelation/21.bible_quote: holy city, new Jerusalem, coming down from God...
revelation/21.note: The heavenly Jerusalem includeth in it all the perfections and teachings of former dispensations.  The New Jerusalem is the heavenly religion...

revelation/21.ref: The World Order of Baha'u'llah, p. 205-206
revelation/21.bible_quote: and I heard a great voice out of heaven saying, Behold the tabernacle of God is with men, and He will dwell with them, and they shall be His people, and God Himself shall be with them and be their God
revelation/21.note: Who can doubt that such a consummation, the coming of age of the human race, must signalize then a world civilization? Fulfilled by Baha'u'llah who came in the station of the Father.

revelation/21.ref: God Passes By, p. 96
revelation/21.bible_quote: Behold the tabernacle of God is with men.  He will dwell with Him...and God Himself shall be with them.
revelation/21.note: The new Law first erected by Baha'u'llah in Baghdad.

revelation/21.ref: Flowers culled...Rose Garden at Acca, p. 5-6
revelation/21.bible_quote: and God shall wipe away all tears from their eyes...
revelation/21.note: All the prophetic statements of the coming of the Kingdom will take place in these days.

revelation/21.ref: Flowers culled...Rose Garden at Acca, p. 19
revelation/21.bible_quote: I am Alpha and Omega, the beginning and the end.
revelation/21.note: The fruit at first is the seed, and again in the fruit you find the seed.  Therefore, He is the Glory of God.

revelation/21.ref: Star of the West, XVIII:7, p. 197 (*)
revelation/21.bible_quote: and He showed me, the Holy Jerusalem descending out of heaven from God...
revelation/21.note: Discoveries of the real will become more and more possible and the influence of divine guidance will be increasingly recognized...This is what is meant in the Bible by the descent of the New Jerusalem. (*Tablet)

revelation/21.ref: God Passes By, p. 95
revelation/21.bible_quote: the Holy Jerusalem descending out of heaven from God.  Having the glory of God...
revelation/21.note: New Jerusalem, Baha'u'llah's Revelation.

revelation/21.ref: TAB:I, p. 93
revelation/21.bible_quote: and he that talked with me had a golden rod to measure the city and the gates thereof and the walls thereof.
revelation/21.note: Certain souls guided people with a rod like unto Moses' rod; others trained people with rod of iron [sword of Muhammad]. In this Greatest Day, rod of pure gold from treasuries of Kingdom of God...this proves a great advance.

revelation/21.ref: TAB:I, p. 92
revelation/21.bible_quote: holy Jerusalem had twelve gates, twelve angels, twelve tribes, twelve foundations, names of twelve apostles of the Lamb...
revelation/21.note: those twelve gates surround the whole universe...much explanation of twelves...

revelation/21.ref: Paper by Shahnaz Waite (out of print #20)
revelation/21.bible_quote: and the foundations of the wall of the city were garnished with precious stones...first stone, jasper...
revelation/21.note: The first Baha'i principle is the oneness of the world of humanity.  The first foundation stone is the jasper, it is clear red, like the hue of the heart.

revelation/21.ref: Paper of Shahnaz Waite (out of print #20)
revelation/21.bible_quote: and the foundations of the city were garnished with precious stones...the second, saphire...
revelation/21.note: The second Baha'i basic principle, the independent investigation of truth.  All must be free to seek truth in their own way.  Saphire is clear blue, the color of faith, inspiration, loyalty, truth.  Man must be free to soar in the dome of heaven's bl

revelation/21.ref: Paper by Shahnaz Waite (out of print #20)
revelation/21.bible_quote: And the foundations of the wall of the city were garnished with precious stones...third, chalcedony...
revelation/21.note: The third Baha'i basic principle, the foundation of religion is one...chalcedony is pure white...white is apparent, yet in it are hidden seven colors, white is the symbol of purity...spiritual symbols and not material stones...

revelation/21.ref: Paper by Shahnaz Waite (out of print #20)
revelation/21.bible_quote: And the foundations of the wall of the city were garnished with precious stones...fourth, emerald...
revelation/21.note: The fourth Baha'i basic principle is religion must be the source of unity...fourth stone is emerald, green, the color of harmony and unity...no color known that green will not harmonize with, color of immortality and humility.

revelation/21.ref: Paper by Shahnaz Waite (out of print #20)
revelation/21.bible_quote: And the foundations of the wall of the city were garnished with precious stones...fifth, sardonyx.
revelation/21.note: The fifth Baha'i basic principle is science and religion must agree, neither must deny the other...sardonyx is red or brown according to the way it is held...religion and science are in essence one but different in color of manifestation.

revelation/21.ref: Paper by Shahnaz Waite (out of print #20)
revelation/21.bible_quote: The foundations of the wall of the city were garnished with precious stones...sixth, sardius.
revelation/21.note: The sixth Baha'i basic principle, the equality of men and women, they must be as two wings of the soul each equally developed...sardius is a stone of two layers, one white, one red, symbolic of the two in one.

revelation/21.ref: Paper by Shahnaz Waite (out of print #20)
revelation/21.bible_quote: The foundations of the wall of the city were garnished with precious stones...the seventh, chrysolyte...
revelation/21.note: The seventh Baha'i basic principle is removal of all prejudice, religious, racial and all superstitions; chrysolyte is exquisitely clear green, symbol of absolute sincerity and truthfulness, purity and selflessness.

revelation/21.ref: Paper by Shahnaz Waite (out of print #20)
revelation/21.bible_quote: The foundations of the wall of the city were garnished with precious stones...eighth, beryl...
revelation/21.note: The eighth Baha'i basic principle is universal peace...beryl is bluish green, blue of faith and loyalty toward our brother man, the green of humility and unity; harmonious blending into one symmetrical whole like a beautiful bouquet of flowers...

revelation/21.ref: Paper by Shahnaz Waite (out of print #20)
revelation/21.bible_quote: The foundations of the wall of the city were garnished with precious stones...ninth, topaz...
revelation/21.note: The ninth Baha'i basic principle is universal education...the topaz, the glory of the sun; symbolic of the light of knowledge and the glory of wisdom which is universal education established in the world...

revelation/21.ref: Paper by Shahnaz Waite (out of print #20)
revelation/21.bible_quote: The foundations of the wall of the city were garnished with precious stones...the tenth, chrysoprasus.
revelation/21.note: The tenth Baha'i basic principle, solution of the economic problem, the chrysoprasus is like chrysolyte a clear green which embodies truthfulness, justice, sincerity and purity, and these are the requisites necessary...the Golden Rule.

revelation/21.ref: Paper by Shahnaz Waite (out of print #20)
revelation/21.bible_quote: The foundations of the wall of the city were garnished with precious stones...eleventh, jacinth...
revelation/21.note: The eleventh Baha'i basic principle, a universal auxiliary language...jacinth is like the jasper, a clear red, the universal color, the hue of the heart, can only understand the heart of another when it can speak the same language.

revelation/21.ref: Paper by Shahnaz Waite (out of print #20)
revelation/21.bible_quote: The foundations of the wall of the city were garnished with precious stones...the twelfth, amethyst...
revelation/21.note: The twelfth Baha'i basic principle, the world tribunal or parliament of man...amethyst is violet, symbolizes spiritual light, reverence, healing, serenity, poise.  This tribunal...must be as the ultra-violet rays for the healing of the nations

revelation/21.ref: Paper by Shahnaz Waite (out of print #20)
revelation/21.bible_quote: The twelve stones in the foundation of the wall of the Holy City...
revelation/21.note: There are twelve Baha'i basic principles upon which this New Jerusalem rests, which are most remarkably co-related to twelve precious stones, spiritual symbols and not material stones both in significance and color...

revelation/21.ref: God Passes By, p. 95
revelation/21.bible_quote: And the city has no need of the sun to shine in it; for the glory of God did lighten it...
revelation/21.note: St. John alluded to Baha'u'llah as the Glory of God.

revelation/21.ref: Paper by Shahnaz Waite (out of print #20)
revelation/21.bible_quote: the glory of God did lighten it...and the gates of it shall not be closed...
revelation/21.note: In each heart must this Holy City be built, that each heart may become one of the precious stones of which the universal city shall be constructed.  Upon the twelve basic principles will it rest....must be studied until they are realized...

revelation/22.bible_quote: I am Alpha and Omega, the beginning and the end, the first and the last.
revelation/22.note: There never has been nor ever can be any change in the eternal Christ...

revelation/22.ref: Some Answered Questions, chapter LXXX, p. 323
revelation/22.bible_quote: I am Alpha and Omega, the beginning and the end, the first and the last...
revelation/22.note: The Word of God is the beginning and end of bounty; eternal bounty does not cease.

revelation/22.bible_quote: I am Alpha and Omega, the beginning and the end, the first and the last.
revelation/22.note: Man is the sum of creation, Alpha and Omega.

revelation/2.ref: Star of the West, XI:16, p. 275(Tablet to Mr.Hall
revelation/2.bible_quote: He that hath an ear let him hear...To him that overcometh will I give to eat of the hidden manna...which no man knoweth saving he receive it...
revelation/2.note: The manna which came from heaven for the disciples was bounty, knowledge, faith, assurance, love, attraction, attachment and enkindlement by the fire of the love of God. My hope is that that gathering may also eat from this manna and bounties.

revelation/3.ref: Tablet to an American, 1903 (out of print #17)
revelation/3.bible_quote: Unto the church in Sardis write: These things saith he that hath seven Spirits of God and the seven stars, I know thy works...

revelation/3.ref: Tablet to an American, 1903 (out of print #17)
revelation/3.bible_quote: these things saith He that hath the seven Spirits of God and the seven stars...
revelation/3.note: Seven spirits and seven stars signify seven letters in the Greatest Name...[Husayn 'Ali and also 'Ali Muhammad]

revelation/4.bible_quote: and upon the seats I saw four and twenty elders sitting, clothed in white raiment; and they had on their hands crowns of gold.
revelation/4.note: these were summoned to the Bab's presence...Letters of the Living--elders.

revelation/9.bible_quote: One woe is past; and, behold, there come two woes more hereafter.
revelation/9.note: It was in the same year that the third woe as anticipated by St. John...quickly succeeded the second, Baha'u'llah after the Bab.

revelation/9.bible_quote: One woe is past; and behold, there come two woes more hereafter.
revelation/9.note: First woe was Muhammad; second was the Bab; third was Baha'u'llah.

revelation/11.bible_quote: and there was given me a reed like unto a rod; the angel stood, syaing, Rise and measure the temple of God, and the altar, and them that worship therein...
revelation/11.note: This reed is the perfect man.  Rod of the Divine Shepherd who leads them in the Kingdom.  A reed when emptied will produce beautiful melodies...investigate the attributes of them who worship in God's temple...who dwell in the Holy of Holies...

revelation/11.bible_quote: But the court which is without the temple leave out, and measure it not; for it is given unto the Gentiles, and the holy city shall they tread under forty and two months...
revelation/11.note: Prophecy of time of the end of Jew's exile forty and two months is 1260 years, duration of the cycle of the Qur'an...

revelation/11.bible_quote: And the Holy City shall they tread under forty and two months...
revelation/11.note: The forty and two months, during which the Holy City as predicted by St. John would be trodden under foot, had elapsed, by the coming of the Bab.

revelation/11.bible_quote: And I will give power unto My two witnesses, and they shall prophesy 1260 days clothed in sackcloth...
revelation/11.note: These two witnesses are Muhammad the Messenger of God and 'Ali , son of Abu Talib...

revelation/11.bible_quote: These are the two olive trees and two candlesticks...
revelation/11.note: Refers to Muhammad and 'Ali.  Olive trees symbolic of Light; candlestick the abode of light, Light of guidance.

revelation/11.bible_quote: standing before the God of the earth...
revelation/11.note: This means that they are standing in the service of God and educating...Arab tribes, they reached the highest degree of civilization.

revelation/11.bible_quote: And after three days and a half, the Spirit of life from God entered into them, and they stood on their feet...And they ascended to heaven in a cloud...The second woe is past.  Behold the third woe is
revelation/11.note: The two witnesses are the Bab (not mentioned here) and Quddus, and Quddus dies before the Bab and then the second woe is past with the ascension of the Bab.

revelation/11.bible_quote: I will give power to my two witnesses...
revelation/11.note: Imam 'Ali, the second of the two witnesses (the first being Muhammad), after whom Baha'u'llah was named.

revelation/11.bible_quote: The beast made war against these two witnesses...
revelation/11.note: that is to say, a spiritual war, meaning that the beast would act in opposition to customs, institutions, and teachings of these two witnesses--virtues diffused by these two witnesses [Muhammad and Imam 'Ali]...

revelation/11.bible_quote: These have power to shut heaven that it rain not in the days of their prophecy...
revelation/11.note: In that cycle they would be like kings.  Laws and teachings of Muhammad and 'Ali raining bounty, they could control it.

revelation/11.bible_quote: And if any man will hurt them, fire proceedeth out of their mouth, and devoureth their enemies...
revelation/11.note: Fulfillment of this...All their enemies were vanquished, put to flight and annihilated.  God assisted them.

revelation/11.bible_quote: And have power over waters to turn them into blood...
revelation/11.note: Muhammad and 'Ali have the same power which Moses had.  If they wished they could turn the waters of the Nile into blood.  Pride of Pharaoh in his power became the cause of destruction...

revelation/11.bible_quote: and their dead bodies shall lie in the streets of the great city, which spiritually is called Sodom and Egypt where also the Lord was crucified.
revelation/11.note: is Syria and especially Jerusalem where the Bani-Umayya then had their dominions.  It was here that the religion of God first disappeared.

revelation/11.bible_quote: the beast that ascendeth out of the bottomless pit shall make war against them and shall overcome them and kill them.
revelation/11.note: Explanation of beast as Bani-Umayya and bottomless pit...

revelation/11.bible_quote: when they shall have finished their testimony...
revelation/11.note: When they have delivered the divine message, promoting the Law of God and propogating teachings, and completed and development of nomad tribes...

revelation/11.bible_quote: And they of the people and kindreds and nations shall see their dead bodies days and shall not suffer their dead bodies to be put in graves...
revelation/11.note: Days are three and a half days, which are forty-two months and 1260 days, the cycle of the Qur'an.

revelation/11.bible_quote: and after three days and one-half, the Spirit of Life from God entered into them and they stood upon their feet.
revelation/11.note: after 1260 years these divine teachings and heavenly virtues, perfections and divine bounties were again renewed by the appearance of the Bab and the devotion of Jinab-i-Quddus.

revelation/11.bible_quote: And after three days and a half, the Spirit of Life from God entered into them and they stood upon their feet...
revelation/11.note: Those two persons whose bodies were lying spiritless are the teachings and law that Muhammad established and 'Ali promoted, from which the reality had departed and only form remained.

revelation/11.bible_quote: And they that dwell upon the earth shall rejoice over them, and make merry, and shall send gifts one to another, because these two Prophets tormented them that dwelt on the earth.
revelation/11.note: People of Europe and Asia rejoiced to see Islam become debased because they had entered their countries and conquered them.

revelation/11.bible_quote: And the same hour was there a great earthquake...
revelation/11.note: Foreshadowed the earthquake in Shiraz, 1268 A.H. after the Bab's execution.

revelation/11.bible_quote: And they ascended up into heaven in a cloud...
revelation/11.note: Ascension of the Bab (and Quddus).

revelation/11.bible_quote: and their enemies beheld them.
revelation/11.note: Many of their enemies, after witnessing the sublimity of their martyrdom realized their perfection.

revelation/11.bible_quote: and they heard a great voice from heaven saying unto them, Come hither, And they ascended up to heaven in a cloud...
revelation/11.note: The sacrifice of the Bab was analogous to that of Christ.  Sun of reality, the Bab; the Moon of guidance, Quddus, then they ascended to the Kingdom of God.

revelation/11.bible_quote: and the remnant were affrighted, and gave glory to the God of heaven.
revelation/11.note: When the earthquake in Fars took place, all the remnant lamented and prayed to God and glorified Him.

revelation/11.bible_quote: The second woe is past; and behold the third woe cometh quickly.
revelation/11.note: The first woe is Muhammad; second woe is the Bab; third woe is Baha'u'llah.  The day of the Lord called woe in Ezekial.

revelation/11.bible_quote: The second woe is past; and behold, the third woe cometh quickly.
revelation/11.note: The day of the Bab, the second woe and Baha'u'llah, the third woe are close.

revelation/11.bible_quote: The second woe is past; and behold the third woe cometh quickly.
revelation/11.note: It was in the year that the third woe as anticipated by St. John quickly succeeded the second, Baha'u'llah after the Bab.

revelation/11.bible_quote: and the seventh angel sounded; and there were great voices in heaven, saying, The kingdoms of this world are become the kingdoms of our Lord...
revelation/11.note: In that Day of God the spiritual and divine kingdoms will be established and the world will be renewed...the worship of God will appear...God will rule for evermore.  This is the Day of God for the Sun of Reality will arise in it...

revelation/11.bible_quote: And the four and twenty elders which sat before God on their seats, fell upon their faces, and worshipped God.
revelation/11.note: Seated on thrones, twenty-four doubled, for the greatness of this Manifestation.

revelation/11.bible_quote: And the nations were angry, and thy wrath is come; and the time of the dead, that they should be judged.
revelation/11.note: Thy teachings opposed; all will be afflicted, they will be deprived of Thy bounty.

revelation/11.bible_quote: And the four and twenty elders worshipped God.
revelation/11.note: Elders identified as the Letters of the Living of the Bab.

revelation/11.bible_quote: And the temple of God was opened in heaven and there was seen in His temple the Ark of His testament...
revelation/11.note: The Covenant of Baha'u'llah extolled by St. John in Apocalypse as the Ark of God's Testament.

revelation/11.bible_quote: and the temple of God was opened in heaven, and there was seen in His temple the Ark of His testament.
revelation/11.note: Holy of Holies is the Law of God...this means that the divine Jerusalem is found, and the Holy of Holies has become visible...

revelation/11.bible_quote: shouldst destroy them which destroy the earth.
revelation/11.note: Righteous endowed with means of everlasting life.  Contrast between neglectful, blind, the ignorant, deprived; the knowledge and wisdom of guided people apparent.

revelation/11.bible_quote: that thou shouldst give reward unto thy servants the Prophets, and to the saints...
revelation/11.note: Endless bounty to the righteous, making them stars...

revelation/11.bible_quote: and there were lightnings and voices and thunderings, and an earthquake and great hail.
revelation/11.note: Explanations of symbolism of violation of Covenant...

revelation/11.bible_quote: and there were lightnings, and voices and thunderings, and an earthquake and great hail.
revelation/11.note: The storm foreshadowed by John in the Apocalypse declared to be violation of the Covenant which caused the structure of the Faith to tremble.

revelation/12.bible_quote: And there appeared a great wonder in the heavens; a woman clothed with the sun, and the moon under her feet, and upon her head a crown of twelve stars.
revelation/12.note: Muhammad and 'Ali, the stars whose names Baha'u'llah bore.

revelation/12.bible_quote: And there appeared a great wonder in heaven; a woman clothed with the sun, and the moon under her feet, and upon her head a crown of twelve stars.
revelation/12.note: The woman is the bride, the Law of God...twelve stars are the twelve Imams who led Muslims after the ascent of Muhammad.

revelation/12.bible_quote: and she being with child cried, travailling in birth...
revelation/12.note: meaning this Law fell into greatest difficulties and endured greatly afflicted until the perfect offspring was produced, the coming of the Bab.

revelation/12.bible_quote: having seven heads and ten horns...
revelation/12.note: The ten horns means the names of Umayyad rulers.  The seven heads are the seven countries and dominions over which the Bani-Umayya had power...

revelation/12.bible_quote: And the dragon stood before the woman which was ready to be delivered, for to devour the child as it was born...
revelation/12.note: Woman is the religion of God; child is the promised one of Islam, the offspring of Muhammad.

revelation/12.bible_quote: and she brought forth a Man Child who was to rule all nations with a rod of iron.
revelation/12.note: Man Child had released creative energies, which were to instill capacity to achieve world unity...meaning the Bab.

revelation/12.bible_quote: And she brought forth a Man Child, who was to rule all nations, with a rod of iron.
revelation/12.note: Man Child is promised Manifestation, the Bab, iron rod is symbol of power.

revelation/12.bible_quote: And this Child was caught up into God and to His throne.
revelation/12.note: The Bab ascended to the spiritual kingdom.

revelation/12.bible_quote: And the woman fled into the wilderness where she had a place prepared of God.
revelation/12.note: Woman is law of God, wilderness is Arabian peninsula.  This refers to 1260 years in which the law was set up in Arabia.

revelation/14.ref: Star of the West, VIII:13, p. 180 (*)
revelation/14.bible_quote: I looked and beheld a white cloud and upon the cloud One sat like unto the Son of man...having on His head a golden crown and in His hand a sharp sickle.
revelation/14.note: After a short time the most luminous sun of the Beauty of Truth shone forth... (*Hundredth anniversary of birth of Baha'u'llah, Tablet: 11/12/1917)

revelation/16.ref: Notes of Mrs. I.D. Brittingham, Acca, 4/1909(*)
revelation/16.bible_quote: and I heard a great voice out of the temple saying to the seven angels, Go your ways and pour out the vials of wrath of God upon the earth.
revelation/16.note: Events in first part of chapter happened before the coming of the Manifestation.  Seven angels are the seven powers... (*translated in Acca, out of print #18)

revelation/16.bible_quote: and the first went, and poured out his vial upon the earth; and there fell a noisome and grievous sore upon the men which had the mark of the beast and upon them which worshipped his image.
revelation/16.note: First angel, first vial, mark of the beast explained... (*translated in Acca, out of print #18)_

revelation/16.bible_quote: and the third angel poured out his vial upon the rivers and fountains of waters; and they became blood.
revelation/16.note: Rivers and fountains signify less influential men than the 'ulama who were affected whose knowledge should be like water, the cause of life; it became like blood, the cause of death. (*translated in Acca, out of print #18)

revelation/16.bible_quote: and I heard another out of the altar say, Even so Lord God Almighty, true and righteous are thy judgments.
revelation/16.note: Another angel or power speaks confirming the justice of God. (*translated in Acca, out of print #18)

revelation/16.bible_quote: And I heard the angel of the waters say, Thou art righteous O Lord, which art and wast and shalt be, because Thou hast judged thus.
revelation/16.note: Angel of waters... (*translated in Acca, out of print #18)

revelation/16.bible_quote: And the second angel poured his vial upon the sea; and it became as the blood of a dead man; and every living soul died in the sea.
revelation/16.note: Second angel and sea symbolizing learned men... (*translated in Acca, out of print #18)

revelation/16.bible_quote: And the fourth angel poured out his vial upon the sun; and pwoer was given unto him to scorch men with fire...And blasphemed the God of heaven because of their pains and their sores and repented not o
revelation/16.note: Explanation of sun... (*translated in Acca, out of print #18)

revelation/16.bible_quote: and the fifth angel poured out his vial upon the seat of the beast; and his kingdom was full of darkness and they gnawed their tongues for pain.
revelation/16.note: Seat of the beast... (*translated in Acca, out of print #18)

revelation/16.bible_quote: and the sixth angel poured out his vial upon the great river Euphrates; and the water thereof was dried up, that the way of the kings of the east might be prepared.
revelation/16.note: Drying up of water means that all learning and science was abolished, making it easy for kings to become powerful...Turkish and Persian kingdoms in the latter day. (*translated in Acca, out of print #18)

revelation/16.bible_quote: and I saw three unclean spirits like frogs come ut of the mouth of the dragon and out of the mouth of the beast and out of the mouth of the false prophets.
revelation/16.note: Explanation of terms. (*translation in Acca, out of print #18)

revelation/16.bible_quote: Behold, I come as a thief.  Blessed is he that watcheth and keepeth his garments lest he walk naked and they see him shame.
revelation/16.note: Thief, keepeth his garments... (*translated in Acca, out of print #18)

revelation/16.bible_quote: and he gathered them together into a place called in the Hebrew tongue Armageddon.
revelation/16.note: Armageddon signifies Roumelia and Macedonia... (*translated in Acca, out of print #18)

revelation/16.ref: Star of the West, X:3, p. 33
revelation/16.bible_quote: And He gathered them together into a place called Armageddon...
revelation/16.note: We are on the eve of the battle of Armageddon, referred to in the sixteenth chapter of Revelation.  The time is two years hence, when only a spark will set aflame the whole of Europe.

revelation/16.bible_quote: and the seventh angel poured out his vial into the air.
revelation/16.note: The seventh angel poured out his influence upon all the world, because the air fills every place. (*translated in Acca, out of print #18)

revelation/16.bible_quote: and there were voices and thunders and lightnings, a mighty earthquake.
revelation/16.note: This means the great war that is to come.  After this war everything will be at peace. (*translated at Acca, out of print # 18)

revelation/16.bible_quote: and the great city was divided into three parts, and the cities of the nations fell; and great Babylon came in remembrance before God to give unto her the cup of the wine of the fierceness of His wrat
revelation/16.note: The city which was cut in three pieces means that kingdom of Babylonia, which is under three kings, England, Persia and Turkey. (*translated in Acca, out of print # 18)

revelation/16.bible_quote: and every island fled away and the mountains were not found.
revelation/16.note: This means people of influence and small kingdoms will be annihilated at that time. (*translated in Acca, out of print # 18)

revelation/16.bible_quote: and there fell upon men a great hail out of heaven; every stone about the weight of a talent; and men blasphemed God because of the plague of the hail.
revelation/16.note: The great hail means both the bombs, shells and instruments of destruction, and the calamities and hardships which will cause people to blaspheme. (*translated in Acca, out of print #18)

revelation/17.bible_quote: for He is the Lord of Lords, the King of Kings...
revelation/17.note: Baha'u'llah proclaimed Himself to be the Lord of Lords and King of Kings.

revelation/19.bible_quote: And he hath on His thigh a name written King of Kings and Lord of Lords.
revelation/19.note: Baha'u'llah proclaimed Himself the King of Kings and Lord of Lords.
